content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PARTICLE + PREPOSITION + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of verb + particle + preposition + noun or pronoun.
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+小品词+介词结构（如look up to）
examples: I can look up to someone in admiration if he (or she) is dedicating his (or her) life to helping other people.、Other people will see you as a knowledgeable person and they will look up to you.、You should face up to the problem and tell everybody the truth, that you are working too hard.、We couldn't just swim and eat ice-cream every day of our summer vacation, so we sat down and came up with the craziest idea ever.
trigger_lemmas: look up to、come up with、face up to
keywords: 三词短语动词,动词+小品词+介词,固定搭配,宾语位置,词序固定

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + ADVERB + PREPOSITION. CanDo: Can use an adverb between the verb and the preposition.
chinese_human_name: 动词与介词短语的副词插入结构：VERB + ADVERB + PREPOSITION
examples: I am really willing to know more about horses and to learn how to deal properly with them.、I hope you will look carefully at the enclosed papers and I'm looking forward to hearing from you soon.
keywords: 动词,副词,介词,短语动词,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: PREPOSITIONAL VERB, STRANDED PREPOSITION. CanDo: Can use verb + preposition, where the preposition is separated from its complement.
chinese_human_name: 介词动词与悬垂介词：动词+介词分离结构
examples: In Poland rules that refer to how to dress at school aren't very strict; we don't wear any uniforms, but our clothes have to be clean and nice to look at.、But there is one difficulty which we should deal with.、I would like to give you some ideas of what people in my community want to listen to.
keywords: 介词动词,悬垂介词,固定搭配,关系代词,疑问词

content: Guideword: FORM: NO OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a wide range of phrasal verbs without an object.
chinese_human_name: 无宾语短语动词：die out, show up, end up等
examples: Some species are dying out, and keeping such animals in zoos where they can give life to new generations is the only way to prevent them from becoming completely extinct.、The following day my grandpa didn’t show up.、If you are not good enough at reading, you'll end up wasting your time.
trigger_lemmas: die out、show up、end up、calm down、break out
keywords: 短语动词,无宾语,小品词,固定搭配,不及物用法

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + NOUN + PARTICLE. CanDo: Can use phrasal verbs + nouns as object + particle.
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+名词+小品词结构
examples: I am glad that you have decided to take some time off and more glad because you are going to the U.S.、Another way is also to turn the computers off in the evenings.、It was necessary to call the electrician up.、If we can make these improvements, we might be able to work this problem out.
keywords: 短语动词,小品词,宾语位置,固定搭配,及物动词

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + PARTICLE + OBJECT. CanDo: Can use a wide range of phrasal verbs + particle + object.
chinese_human_name: 三词短语动词：动词+小品词+宾语结构
examples: I don't need to use my imagination while I'm surfing the internet, but if I'm reading a book I can build up the whole surroundings and the characters in my own head.、I had already booked my seat on the ferry-boat to Athens and I couldn't put off my crossing.、I can surf the internet and look up some useful information.、The concert finished very late and after the concert I had to clean up the hall.
keywords: 短语动词,小品词,宾语,固定搭配,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: SEMI-MODAL AUXILIARY VERBS, 'DARE', 'NEED'. CanDo: Can use semi-modal auxiliary verbs, 'dare' and 'need'.
chinese_human_name: 半情态助动词：dare与need的用法
examples: You needn't worry about where we can stay.、I think that they are rather jealous because they daren't give up their car.
keywords: 半情态助动词,dare,need,动词原形,否定形式

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + NEW SUBJECT + '-ING' FORM. CanDo: Can introduce a new subject before the '-ing' form (using noun or object pronoun).
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词后接新主语加-ing形式：mind/stand/imagine等动词的特殊用法
examples: If your boss doesn't mind you delaying, it could be a possible solution.、I could not stand people shouting at me, or taking pictures of me all day. It would be horrible.、Oh just one more thing: would you mind me staying in your flat again?、We imagine it being a frozen land, where the people are ‘frozen’ too - both 'inside' and 'outside'.
keywords: 新主语,-ing形式,宾格代词,mind,stand,imagine

content: Guideword: FORM: 'TO'-INFINITIVE OR '-ING' FORM, MEANING. CanDo: Can follow some verbs with a 'to'-infinitive or an '-ing' form, with a change in meaning.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词后接to不定式或-ing形式的用法区别
examples: He said if you need to change the time, remember to contact him to make a new appointment.、I know it is difficult to get by with such a low salary but I am sure you have not stopped to think twice about your life.、I remember feeling very unhappy and confused all day long.、After I had a baby, I needed to stop working.
trigger_lemmas: remember to、stop doing、try to、forget to、regret doing
keywords: to不定式,-ing形式,动词搭配,意义变化,remember to do,stop doing

content: Guideword: FORM: VERB + '-ING' FORM. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of verbs followed by an '-ing' form.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 动词后接-ing形式：常见搭配与用法
examples: [talking about cars] ... we can't avoid using them because we are used to them.、I couldn't stand being there.、Moreover we may consider offering bonus schemes, to increase the staff's loyalty to our company.
keywords: 动词后接-ing,动名词,现在分词,情感表达,习惯描述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: VERBS OF SENSES  + OBJECT + '-ING'. CanDo: Can use some verbs connected with the senses + direct object + an '-ing' form, to give emphasis to an ongoing activity.
category: SuperCategory: VERBS. SubCategory: patterns_with to and -ing
chinese_human_name: 感官动词 + 宾语 + '-ing'形式：强调进行中的活动
examples: Then I heard someone screaming, I was afraid and I said to the others: "Let's go out, something is happening".、I think we can learn nothing by seeing animals out of their habitat: we cannot see them running or eating or hunting.
keywords: 感官动词,宾语,-ing形式,进行中的活动,强调持续性

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THERE' + VERBS WITH MODAL MEANING. CanDo: Can use 'there' with other verbs with modal meaning + 'be' + complement.
chinese_human_name: there与情态动词搭配：there + 情态动词 + be + 补语
examples: I figured out that there had to be matches somewhere; Bob, who owned the cabin, had told me that it was well equipped.、In the library there needs to be school books and also other books and magazines.、There is going to be a theatre performance, a chess championship and last but not least, swimming races where the participants will win medals and a lot of prizes.
trigger_lemmas: there must be、there should be、there needs to be、there is going to be
keywords: there be句型,情态动词,补语,存在表达,语气修饰

content: Guideword: FORM: LINKING + COMPLEMENT. CanDo: Can use a wide range of linking verbs with complements.
chinese_human_name: 系动词+补语结构：描述状态与特征
examples: There are indeed many ways of doing this and it all seems very confusing.、The food is a little bit strange but tastes good.、Now the whole house appeared very unfamiliar to me.、Alice was so unhappy that she remained silent for a long time.、I am writing to inform you that there is some incorrect information which appears in The Student Tourist Guidebook you published last year.
keywords: 系动词,补语,形容词补语,状态描述,感官动词

content: Guideword: FORM: MODIFICATION, REPORTING VERB + ADVERB. CanDo: Can modify the reporting verb with an adverb.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语中修饰转述动词的副词用法
examples: "So this is a real cow, mom?" she asked doubtfully.、"A hundred dollars for one day. Is that a deal?" her husband said forcefully.、"Come on, what's wrong?" Bella asked curiously.、"Put that light out!" I shouted calmly.
keywords: 间接引语,转述动词,副词修饰,语气表达,时态变化

content: Guideword: FORM: DIRECT SPEECH, REPORTING CLAUSE, MID POSITION. CanDo: Can report speech and thought directly using the reporting verb in the mid position of the reported clause.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：报告动词位于引语中间位置
examples: "No problem", I thought, "there is only one person".、"We have come together", this man said, "to celebrate our annual meeting and to call our master's ghost tonight!”、"No problem", I thought, "there is only one person".、"Forgive me, sweetheart", he said, "I will never leave you alone again.”
keywords: 间接引语,报告动词,中间位置,标点使用,时态一致

content: Guideword: FORM: DIRECT SPEECH, REPORTING CLAUSE, INVERTED SUBJECT. CanDo: Can report speech directly inverting the subject and verb in the reporting clause where the subject is a proper noun or noun phrase.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：主语与动词倒装（专有名词/名词短语作主语）
examples: "I was astonished when I saw them standing there", said John.、"Who are you?" asked Peter.、"Would you mind lending me a part of your newspaper?" said a whispering voice.、What do you think about this? said the Inspector to the policeman.
keywords: 间接引语,主语倒装,专有名词,名词短语,转述从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: REPORTING VERBS, PAST CONTINUOUS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous of the reporting verb to report mental processes, with a finite or non-finite 'wh-'clause in the reported clause.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：用过去进行时报告心理活动（含wh-从句）
examples: I was wondering why I failed.、So, he was wondering why we didn't have our letters.、I was thinking which of the two would be more interesting, and I prefer to go to "Can Animals Speak", since I love them and I have two. So, I want to know how to communicate with them.、We were wondering what had happened for a few minutes but then we realised that there had been a power cut.、While he was thinking how to reply, Jenny took his hand and led him to the school.
keywords: 间接引语,过去进行时,报告动词,wh-从句,心理活动

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: CITATION, PRESENT SIMPLE. CanDo: Can use the present simple form of the reporting verb to report information from a written source and a present tense verb in the reported clause.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 转述书面信息：使用现在时态动词的间接引语
examples: First of all, your advertisement says that you have got two great nights in a hotel for us.、It says you are asking for people to help in a summer camp for foreign school children.、Firstly, your advertisement  tells  us that hotel has two great nights in a wonderful 3-star hotel、The guidebook says that we can get there by train from London.
keywords: 转述书面信息,现在时态,间接引语,书面来源,广告转述

content: Guideword: FORM: REPORTED REQUESTS AND COMMANDS, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can report requests and commands with 'ask' or 'tell' + direct object + 'not' + 'to-'infinitive.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：用ask/tell+宾语+not+to不定式转述否定请求和命令
examples: Meanwhile, she told me not to be scared but the place was very... old.、I told him not to climb the wall but he was so interested in doing movements that he did not listen to me.、Arriving there, my father told me not to go far and to stay near him.、I asked Pat not to tell anyone, and she promised me she wouldn't.
trigger_lemmas: ask not to、tell not to、warn not to
keywords: 间接引语,转述请求,转述命令,否定结构,ask/tell + not to

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: TEMPORAL SHIFTS, PAST. CanDo: Can report speech about events in the past with backshifts for tenses and words relating to time.
category: SuperCategory: REPORTED SPEECH. SubCategory: reported speech
chinese_human_name: 间接引语：过去时态的时间回溯与时态转换
examples: She had told me the previous day that she had something important to tell me.、We met Daisy at school on the following day and we told her that the previous day we had been at her house; her grandfather had told us that unluckily she wasn't at home.、My boss had told me the previous day that an important customer was going to visit the company in the morning.、I had told my friends the day before that I expected to get an A!
trigger_lemmas: the previous day、the following day、had told、reported speech
keywords: 间接引语,时态回溯,时间词语调整,报告动词,过去完成时

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: TAGS WITH IMPERATIVES AS SOFTENERS. CanDo: Can use an affirmative or negative tag after an imperative clause to soften the imperative.
chinese_human_name: 祈使句附加疑问句：用疑问尾句软化命令语气
examples: Think about it, will you?、Go to the Lake Frene route, will you?、Let's check together, shall we?
trigger_lemmas: think about it、go to、let's check、help me
keywords: 祈使句,附加疑问句,语气软化,will you,shall we

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE QUESTIONS WITH MAIN VERBS. CanDo: Can use 'wh-'words + the negative form of auxiliary 'do' + subject + main verb to form 'wh-'questions.
chinese_human_name: wh-疑问句的否定形式：用助动词do构成
examples: You still have this agonising headache. Why don't you go to your doctor?、Why didn't you check with the ticket office first before you wrote your article?、Why didn't you say something about it?、Why haven't you told me before?
keywords: wh-疑问句,否定形式,助动词do,词序,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: 'OURS' AS OBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'ours' with singular and plural reference, in object positions, and complement positions after 'be' and after prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'ours'作宾语和补语：单复数指代与位置用法
examples: Can we rent windsurf boards or should we bring ours with us?、[talking about characters in a book] … when we read about them we think that we are the characters and we live their stories as if they were ours.、Aldous Huxley was able to create a new world which is not so different from ours.、This road shouldn't be allowed in the middle of a small town like ours.
keywords: 物主代词,宾语位置,补语位置,单复数指代,避免重复

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPARATIVE CLAUSES WITH 'OURS', 'HERS'. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronouns 'hers' and 'ours' in comparative clauses.
chinese_human_name: 比较从句中的物主代词：hers和ours的用法
examples: I told my mother that your Spanish omelette is better than hers.、Lots of changes which may occur during the next fifty years can make us fear that our sons' and grandsons' lives will not be as happy as ours.
trigger_lemmas: better than、as happy as、more than、less than
keywords: 物主代词,比较从句,hers,ours,所有格替代

content: Guideword: FORM: +  'OF OURS'. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'ours' after noun + 'of'.
chinese_human_name: 名词后接“of ours”的所有格代词用法
examples: Finally we went to Venice where we met some friends of ours and spent with them the rest of the holiday.、The credit crunch is heavily affecting this region, therefore all retail sales have fallen and many competitors of ours are decreasing their sales too.、Paul, a classmate of ours, will be the D.J. and we are thinking of listening to rock music, since Mr. Brown likes it.
trigger_lemmas: friend of ours、classmate of ours、competitor of ours、colleague of ours
keywords: 所有格代词,of结构,所属关系,人际关系表达,名词后置修饰

content: Guideword: FORM: 'OURS' AS SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'ours', with singular and plural reference, in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'ours'作主语：单复数指代用法
examples: Ours is the only store in this locality which opens at 7.00 am. (Business English Certificate (Vantage); B2; Tamil)、Ours is a retail company with 5 outlets, dealing in furnishings.、In order to persuade them, we would like to show comparisons between our products and the ones from other companies to demonstrate that ours are more effective and efficient.
trigger_lemmas: ours is、ours are、demonstrate that ours、compared to theirs
keywords: 物主代词,ours,主语位置,单复数指代,名词性物主代词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'HERS' AS OBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'hers', with singular reference, in object positions, and complement positions after 'be' and after prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词hers作宾语和补语：单数指代用法详解
examples: At the entrance, the security guard asked for my identity card. Pat gave hers.、She didn't remember leaving it there, it wasn't even hers, which is what frightened her the most.、But when she gave this suitcase a good look, she realised that it wasn't hers.、She saw him on a train running parallel to hers.
trigger_lemmas: give hers、not hers、parallel to hers、of hers
keywords: 物主代词,名词性物主代词,单数指代,宾语位置,补语位置

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THEIRS' AS OBJECT. CanDo: Can use the possessive pronoun 'theirs', with singular and plural reference, in object positions, and complement positions after 'be' and after prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 物主代词'theirs'作宾语和补语用法
examples: I could show them the traditional things of our country and learn theirs.、She told him that this baby was theirs.、Red Stone are a very big group, you know that I'm a great fan of theirs.、I realise that it can be a very interesting experience and I can also improve my foreign language as well as theirs.
keywords: 物主代词,宾语位置,补语位置,所属关系,替代用法

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'BY' + PLURAL. CanDo: Can use plural reflexive pronouns with 'by' to mean alone, without any help.
chinese_human_name: 反身代词与'by'连用：表示'独自、无需帮助'
examples: A friend of mine and I are planning to spend a short holiday by ourselves.、There are many things to say, but I think that you will find these by yourselves.、Then suddenly, the lights started clicking on and off, the windows opened by themselves.
keywords: 反身代词,by ourselves,独立行动,无需帮助,复数形式

content: Guideword: USE: 'YOURSELVES', FOR POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use the plural reflexive pronoun 'yourselves' for politeness.
chinese_human_name: 反身代词yourselves的礼貌用法
examples: Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to you in response to the advertisement published by yourselves in "the Traveller" regarding The Trip of a Lifetime.、The question you asked droves me back to my early life. My childhood. Like yourselves I am also living in a busy town, in a busy street. But when I was a little kid I was with my grand parents in Kandy.、Also, it is a great opportunity to improve my sailing skills as training will be provided by yourselves.
keywords: 反身代词,yourselves,礼貌用法,正式语境,商务交流

content: Guideword: USE: 'ITSELF', FOR EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use the singular pronoun 'itself' for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 反身代词强调用法：itself的强调功能
examples: In my opinion, the main characters do not have to be liked by readers but the story itself must be good and interesting to be successful.、The building itself looks splendid and beautiful.
trigger_lemmas: by itself、in itself、of itself、speak for itself
keywords: 反身代词,强调用法,itself,单数中性,事物本身

content: Guideword: FORM: PLURAL, AFTER PREPOSITIONS. CanDo: Can use plural reflexive pronouns after prepositions where the object of the preposition is the same as the subject of the verb.
chinese_human_name: 介词后使用复数反身代词：当介词宾语与动词主语相同时
examples: Doing sports is an excellent way to relax and it can help us to feel good about ourselves.、The staff didn't have enough time for themselves.
trigger_lemmas: feel good about、have time for、talk among、take care of
keywords: 反身代词,介词宾语,复数主语,ourselves,themselves

content: Guideword: FORM: SAME SUBJECT AND OBJECT, PLURAL. CanDo: Can use plural reflexive pronouns to refer to actions where the subject and object of the verb are the same.
chinese_human_name: 复数反身代词：主语与宾语相同时的用法
examples: In this way we will be able to enjoy ourselves even if this is not well-paid work.、In the afternoons, you'll be able to visit the archaeological sites and in the evening you can entertain yourselves by dancing or listening to music in our city clubs.、But adults often ask themselves the question - isn't it cruel to keep animals in zoos?
keywords: 复数反身代词,主语宾语一致,群体动作,自我反思,常见搭配

content: Guideword: USE: PLURAL, FOR EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use plural reflexive pronouns for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 复数反身代词用于强调：ourselves, yourselves, themselves
examples: The food is not very good, but sometimes we can prepare something to eat ourselves.、They patiently explained to me my job even though they were fairly busy themselves.、Cars themselves are never dangerous. It depends on us, actually.
keywords: 复数反身代词,强调用法,ourselves,yourselves,themselves

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BY ITSELF'. CanDo: Can use the reflexive pronoun 'itself' with 'by' to mean alone or without any help.
chinese_human_name: 反身代词搭配：by itself 表示“独自/自动”
examples: If an animal is kept by itself , with no one to keep it company, it will get lonely and very sad.、Suddenly, the window opened by itself and the room filled with cold air.
keywords: 反身代词,itself,by itself,自动,独自

content: Guideword: USE: 'IN ITSELF', INTENSIFYING. CanDo: Can use the fixed expression 'in itself' as an intensifier .
chinese_human_name: 反身代词固定表达：'in itself'作为强调用法
examples: I would also spend much more quality time with my family as a whole, which is quite important in itself.、The architecture in itself is beautiful, but the garden is very wonderful, too.、To begin with, a car, in my opinion, can't be harmful in itself. The trouble is that, nowadays, very fast cars are put on the market and we never know if they are going to be driven by wise people or, instead, by crazy or dreadful drivers.
keywords: in itself,强调用法,反身代词,固定表达,内在特性

content: Guideword: FORM: (OBJECT) USING 'IT' TO INTRODUCE. CanDo: Can use 'it' as an object with 'make' to introduce something the speaker or writer is going to refer to.
chinese_human_name: 代词it作宾语：用it引入后续内容的结构
examples: This shyness makes it hard for me to speak in public, or even to go out with my friends as often as I should.、Other retail companies with cheaper prices and lots of discounts make it impossible for us to do business.
keywords: 代词it,形式宾语,make it结构,for someone to do something,引入内容

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can leave out the subject pronoun with a limited range of verbs, in informal contexts. ► ellipsis
examples: Must rush now because I have to go out with Paul.、Sounds great.、Got to go now.、Can't wait to hear about your exam.

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) 'ONE'. CanDo: Can use 'one' as a generic personal pronoun in the subject position to mean people in general. ► generic pronouns
chinese_human_name: 通用人称代词：主语位置上的'one'
examples: If one doesn't live close enough to walk to work, one can choose to get there by bicycle or by car.
keywords: 通用人称代词,主语位置,泛指,正式语体,一致性

content: Guideword: FORM: (SUBJECT) EMPTY 'IT'. CanDo: Can use dummy 'it' with 'appears', 'feels', 'looks' and 'seems'.
chinese_human_name: 形式主语it搭配感官动词：appears、feels、looks、seems
examples: When you watch a film, it seems to be that you are inside it, and you are a character in it.、… your company has carried out a full investigation on the matter and it appears that the disappearance was not the result of criminal activity. (Portugal; B2 VANTAGE; 2008);、It appears that there was an error with the older computer system.
keywords: 形式主语it,感官动词,that从句,主观印象,客观陈述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THOSE', SUBSTITUTION. CanDo: Can use 'those' as a substitute, followed by a relative clause or '-ed' or '-ing'.
chinese_human_name: 指示代词'those'的替代用法：后接关系从句或分词结构
examples: Moreover, for those who are not interested in sports and who prefer shopping, it would be a good idea to prevent cars and especially lorries from running in the center of the town.、In my opinion students should be forced to study all of the subjects, not only those which are enjoyable.、[talking about buildings]  Those that can be rebuilt wouldn't be demolished.、The opening hours of the store came in for a lot of praise, with 87% of those surveyed ranking it as good.、All those attending are requested to be on time.
keywords: 指示代词,替代用法,关系从句,分词结构,复数指代

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THESE ONES', 'THOSE ONES' SUBSTITUTION. CanDo: Can use 'these ones', 'those ones' as a substitute for plural countable nouns that have previously been mentioned.
chinese_human_name: 指示代词复数替代：these ones/those ones的用法
examples: This is only the beginning; there are a lot of things that should be done, but let's just start with these ones.、I have got several of those ones.
keywords: 指示代词,复数替代,these ones,those ones,可数名词

content: Guideword: FORM: SUBJECT AND OBJECT PRONOUNS, 'EACH', 'SEVERAL', 'NEITHER', 'ENOUGH'. CanDo: Can use pronouns 'each', 'either', 'enough', 'neither', 'several' as subject and object pronouns.
chinese_human_name: 数量代词作主语和宾语：each, several, neither, enough
examples: As you could guess, each has a very unique style.、I would like to enquire if there will be one group or several depending on level of students?、Considering my abilities, there are several that I think you should consider.、Comparing the two firms, both of them go some way towards fulfilling our needs, but neither covers all.、[talking about toilets] They are very clean and there are enough so you don't have to wait.
keywords: 数量代词,主语,宾语,单复数一致,替代名词

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'OF' + OBJECT PRONOUN. CanDo: Can use a wide range of pronouns ('neither', 'either', 'none') with 'of' followed by an object pronoun.
chinese_human_name: 代词与'of'结构：neither/either/none + of + 宾语代词
examples: Stella and her boyfriend, ... lived with Chuck at the same house, but neither of them knew that Chuck had passed a very complicated exam to be a spy for the United States.、Neither of us could forsee any possible rise or fall in the price of wheat.、How about spending the last couple of days doing some activities like skiing, horse riding and rafting. If you are interested in either of them, have a go.、We didn't know what they wanted. and none of us spoke any Italian.
keywords: neither,either,none,宾语代词,of结构

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THESE ONES', 'THOSE ONES'. CanDo: Can use 'these ones', 'those ones' as a substitute for plural countable nouns which have already been mentioned or are obvious from the context.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: substitution, one, ones, none
chinese_human_name: 代词替代：these ones和those ones的用法
examples: This is only the beginning; there are a lot of things that should be done, but let's just start with these ones.、Beside those ones, there's also an equal number of individuals who get crippled for life. (Portugal; B2 VANTAGE; 1993; Portuguese; Pass
keywords: 代词替代,复数可数名词,these ones,those ones,上下文指代

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH RELATIVE CLAUSES, FOCUS. CanDo: Can use indefinite pronouns with a relative clause to form complex noun phrases, to give focus.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词与关系从句：用something/anything/everything等构建强调性名词短语
examples: Something that I like very much is the idea of the classes.、Something extra, which is not really pleasant, is their behavior.、Something really good about it is that it'd give us some work experience, which we don't have right now.、Everything that I believed changed and without any help I managed to write perfectly, according to my teacher.、Everyone who can use a computer can use the new products.
keywords: 不定代词,关系从句,强调,名词短语,that/which/who

content: Guideword: FORM: SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use the full range of indefinite pronouns as subjects, with a singular verb.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词作主语：everything、nothing、everybody等与单数动词的搭配
examples: But, nowadays nothing is free, so you have to pay for everything.、Her parents had told her everything weeks ago; she had cried and argued, but nothing could change her parents’ opinion.、Yes it was Christmas, that's why everybody tried to smile.、Everywhere is green and clean.、When we came back home, everywhere was very untidy.、I searched my car to see if anything was missing.
keywords: 不定代词,主语,单数动词,主谓一致,everything

content: Guideword: USE: VAGUE EXPRESSIONS. CanDo: Can use indefinite pronouns in vague expressions to refer to things in a non-specific way.
category: SuperCategory: PRONOUNS. SubCategory: indefinite - thing, -one, -body etc
chinese_human_name: 不定代词在模糊表达中的用法：-thing、-one、-body等
examples: Is it worth having a nervous breakdown or anything like that?、My personal idea to help the environment is to try to plant more trees around the college, for example, in the zone behind the college or somewhere else.
trigger_lemmas: anything like that、somewhere else、or something、anyone else
keywords: 不定代词,模糊表达,非特指,-thing系列,-one系列,-body系列,else搭配

content: Guideword: USE: 'WE', 'US', GENERAL. CanDo: Can use 'we' and 'us' to refer to people in general.
chinese_human_name: 代词泛指用法：用'we'和'us'指代一般人
examples: These days the car is everywhere, we can see cars all over the world.、In this film we can see the life of a female teenager … in South-Africa.、We all know that being a writer is difficult; either we know how to write or we don't.、Some of us find it very useful, whereas others still have difficulty in accepting technology as a valuable thing for everyone.、[talking about zoos giving us a chance to see many exotic animals] Zoos give us different opportunities to do that and so to understand nature.
trigger_lemmas: we all know、we can see、some of us、give us
keywords: 泛指,一般人,普遍现象,共同经验,包容性

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: GENDER NEUTRAL. CanDo: Can use 'they/them' to refer back to indefinite pronouns when we do not know the number or gender.
chinese_human_name: 不定代词回指：they/them的性别中立用法
examples: If someone is watching a film that they don't like they can always choose another channel to watch to.、If anyone wishes to make any presentation they can contact Mr. Hari, Events Department.、If a student wants to make music there is no point teaching them science, but to be a good musician I think general knowledge is important as well .
keywords: 不定代词,性别中立,they/them,回指,单数代词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: GENDER NEUTRAL. CanDo: Can use 'he/she', 'he' or 'she' or 'they' to refer back to gender neutral singular nouns or indefinite pronouns when we are not sure of the gender.
chinese_human_name: 性别中性单数名词回指：he/she、he、she、they的通用用法
examples: If a child had free time, he/she would play on his/her own and not with other children.、Furthermore, if somebody wants to be a journalist, he or she has to have an enormous knowledge of the world and people, because sometimes they must act like psychologists in order to obtain pieces of information.
keywords: 性别中性,单数名词,不定代词,he/she,they单数用法

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'ONE ANOTHER', FORMAL. CanDo: Can use 'one another' as the object of a verb or complement of a preposition to talk about the mutual behaviour of two or more people, often in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 相互代词：one another（正式场合用法）
examples: I also thought to create a studying space where students, staff and visitors can meet one another.、Since we last saw one another many things have happened, but I must admit I have never enjoyed myself again the way I did when I was with you.、Perhaps it will help me understand what my two dogs say to one another.
trigger_lemmas: meet one another、talk to one another、help one another、understand one another
keywords: 相互代词,正式语境,动词宾语,介词补语,群体互动

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH ADVERBS OF INDEFINITE FREQUENCY. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with an increasing range of adverbs of indefinite frequency, often to talk about surprising or undesirable situations or events.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时搭配不定频率副词：表达持续或频繁行为
examples: … scientists don't really get together with top models … they are constantly studying and reading books, whereas the job of a top model is actually based on physical appearance.、… you're continuously dealing with toxic substances and flammable liquids…
keywords: 现在进行时,不定频率副词,持续性行为,频繁行为,情感强调

content: Guideword: FORM: INVERSION WITH 'NOT ONLY … BUT ALSO'. CanDo: Can use the inverted form of the past simple with auxiliary 'do', in the phrase 'not only … but also'.
chinese_human_name: 倒装结构：not only ... but also 的现在简单式用法
examples: Not only do they save you filing time, but also they save office space.、Not only does it look nice but it's also full of places that we should visit, such as the enormous old castle or the extremely fascinating butterfly farm!!
keywords: 倒装结构,not only but also,现在简单时,助动词do/does,强调句型

content: Guideword: USE: STORIES AND COMMENTARIES. CanDo: Can use the present simple to summarise events or plot in a story or piece of history, often to give immediate dramatic interest.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时：用于故事和历史事件总结
examples: The plot of the book takes place in Vienna after the Second World War.、The scene takes place on a train. … On this train, a man is sleeping. He dreams. He dreams of one of his work colleagues who lost his job last year.
keywords: 一般现在时,故事总结,历史叙述,戏剧效果,情节概括

content: Guideword: USE: SPEECH ACT VERBS. CanDo: Can use the present simple with a wide range of speech act verbs, including '(dis)agree', 'accept', 'advise'.
chinese_human_name: 一般现在时与言语行为动词：表达观点、建议与回应
examples: We disagree with the new numbering system as it is too complicated.、I'd love to go to the concert with you so I accept your invitation.、I advise you to take a coat because it's winter, you know, it's a bit cold.
keywords: 言语行为动词,一般现在时,即时表达,观点建议,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: FORMAL. CanDo: Can use less frequent simple prepositions, often in a more formal, literary or business context.
chinese_human_name: 正式语境中的低频简单介词：throughout, upon, toward, unlike, amongst
examples: Suddenly the lights went out and a kind of silent screaming was heard throughout the whole dark room.、So why don’t you act upon my advice?、I took bus number 19 from Angel tube station toward Battersea Park.、In Tottenham, transport is easy, buses are frequent, unlike other areas.、A survey was carried out amongst the students and teachers.
keywords: 正式介词,低频介词,介词短语,商务英语,文学语境

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PREPOSITION + 'WH-'WORD. CanDo: Can use preposition + relative pronoun as complement, to avoid preposition stranding, often in formal contexts. ► Clauses: relative
chinese_human_name: 介词+关系代词：正式语体中的关系从句结构
examples: According to your advertisement in a language magazine, you have a vacancy in which I am very interested.、I hope that you can help me by answering some questions about the club of which you are the secretary.、In my opinion children need someone to whom they can talk.
keywords: 介词+关系代词,正式语体,关系从句,介词悬空,which/whom

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX. CanDo: Can use a wide range of complex prepositions.
chinese_human_name: 复杂介词短语：表达例外、补充、让步等关系
examples: She did not say very much except for "oh" and "yes, yes" every once in a while.、[talking about animals in zoos] And it gives them the possibility of gradually gaining knowledge about other living creatures apart from humans.、[giving suggestions on how to make the reception area of a school more attractive] It is based on my personal opinions in addition to a sample of 500 people who are students and staff at the school, and also visitors.、Now, as for the camping, I admit that I'm not a great fan of it.、I hope that, in spite of some small problems, people liked the festival and we will be able to attend it next year.
trigger_lemmas: except for、apart from、in addition to、as for、in spite of
keywords: 复杂介词,固定搭配,逻辑关系,例外表达,补充信息

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous with a wide range of adverbs in the normal mid position.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时与副词搭配：中位副词用法详解
examples: My younger brother was constantly bothering me.、One day, as she was wistfully walking in the dusk of that day, she told herself she could either go on living her lonely life or make a huge effort to fit in.
keywords: 过去进行时,副词,中位位置,频率副词,方式副词

content: Guideword: USE: POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use the past continuous to make a request or suggestions more polite or less direct.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时：用于礼貌请求或建议
examples: I was wondering if I could impose on you again for my next visit.、I was thinking that you could wear your Marilyn Monroe dress as your fancy-dress costume.、I was thinking that you could come to my house and see the movie.
trigger_lemmas: i was wondering、i was thinking、i was hoping
keywords: 过去进行时,礼貌请求,委婉建议,语用功能,情态动词

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时否定形式：had not been doing
examples: Laura realised that she had not been studying very hard lately.、I couldn't tell her about Mark because she hadn't been doing anything else but talking about him for the last three weeks.、Last week, two of your employers came to solve the problems of my central heating system as it had not been working for two days.
keywords: 过去完成进行时,否定形式,had not been,动词-ing,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: BACKGROUND INFORMATION WITH TIME CONJUNCTION. CanDo: Can use the past perfect continuous after a time conjunction to give background information.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时：时间连词后的背景信息描述
examples: After we had been sunbathing at the beach all day long, we went every evening to a cosy restaurant called "The Barking Cat", where we had a good meal and some wine.、After I had been waiting for an hour, I decided to go through the gate and go in on foot.
keywords: 过去完成进行时,时间连词,背景信息,持续性动作,动词-ing形式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: BACKGROUND INFORMATION WITH RELATIVE CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use the past perfect continuous in a relative clause to give background information.  ► relative clauses
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时在关系从句中提供背景信息
examples: And there were two men who had been chasing the murderer to find out who the man is and rescue the girl....、The guide also tells some funny stories about an old lord, who had been living there in the 18th century.、After a few minutes the door was opened and the man who  had been following me came in.
trigger_lemmas: had been living、had been chasing、had been following
keywords: 过去完成进行时,关系从句,背景信息,持续性动作,时间顺序

content: Guideword: USE: RESULTS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect continuous to talk about events which started before a time in the past and which finished, but where the effects or results were still important at a point in the past.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时：强调过去某时之前持续动作的结果或影响
examples: Unfortunately it had been snowing for a long time and so I was unable to go out for a walk.、We had been working very hard all the morning so by that time, I was very tired.
trigger_lemmas: had been、for a long time、all morning、so
keywords: 过去完成进行时,持续性动作,结果影响,时间状语,原因解释

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect continuous with adverbs in the normal mid position.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 过去完成进行时与副词搭配：副词在句中位置的使用
examples: I had been working hard at my job and I had really been looking forward to this holiday.、When he died, he was a rich man, he had only been living ten months in the house he had built for fourteen years …
keywords: 过去完成进行时,副词位置,mid position,持续性动作,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AFTER 'BECAUSE', EXPLANATIONS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple after 'because' to give explanatory information.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时在because后解释原因
examples: He was sleeping but I realised that this was because he had lost a lot of blood.、I was driving on to my parents' house because I had arranged to have dinner with them.
keywords: 过去完成时,because,解释原因,时间先后,had + 过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: AFTER 'IF ONLY' AND 'WISH', IMAGINED PAST. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form after 'if only', and the affirmative and negative forms after 'wish' to talk about regret.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时在'if only'和'wish'后的用法：表达遗憾与想象
examples: If only I had listened to my father!、If only I had met her before.、I am sure, because at the end of the concert, I said to my friend "I wish they had played a bit more".、I wish I hadn't told Pat about my plans.、I wish I hadn't done that but now I can't do anything.
keywords: 过去完成时,if only,I wish,表达遗憾,想象过去

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple with a wide range of adverbs (including 'finally', 'recently', 'simply') in the normal mid-position.  ► adverbs
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时与副词搭配：finally, recently, simply等副词的中位用法
examples: He had finally achieved his goal!、She had suddenly woken up at that noise, but now was trying to persuade herself it was just a dream.、And had all the furniture and David's personal things been stolen by thieves or had they just simply disappeared?
keywords: 过去完成时,副词中位,finally,recently,simply

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERSION WITH 'NO SOONER … THAN'. CanDo: Can invert the subject and auxiliary verb with 'no sooner … than' to talk about something that happened immediately before something else, often in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时倒装结构：no sooner … than
examples: … but no sooner had I gone to bed than someone broke the door down.、But, no sooner had I got there than my classmates informed me that I had done well in my physics exam.
keywords: 倒装,过去完成时,no sooner … than,正式语境,时间顺序

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use question forms.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时疑问句：had + 主语 + 过去分词
examples: Had I made the same mistake twice?、… the question was: Why had he done that?
keywords: 过去完成时,疑问句,had,过去分词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: INVERSION WITH 'NEVER (BEFORE)'. CanDo: Can invert the subject and auxiliary verb after 'never (before)' to talk about a unique event, often in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时倒装结构：never (before) 的倒装用法
examples: Never had I been in such a ridiculous situation!、Never before had we seen such marvellous species of fish.
keywords: 过去完成时,倒装,never,formal contexts,unique event

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can leave out the subject before the past perfect simple where it is understood from the previous clause.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时主语省略：在从句中省略已明确的主语
examples: But now she felt stronger and had lost her fear.、Simon was a very famous writer and had written ten best-sellers.、All her friends from Chicago had come to visit her and had brought a huge chocolate cake with them.、They were cold and had gone numb.
keywords: 过去完成时,主语省略,复合句,并列连词,had + 过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTS OF STATEMENTS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple to report statements, where the main verb in the reporting clause is in the past simple.  ► reported speech
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时：转述过去陈述句
examples: […] one morning she was listening to the radio, when suddenly the announcer said that the police had arrested a man who had stolen five expensive and unique paintings.、She tried to explain what had happened, but she couldn't.、I looked at the address and I knew what had happened to my sister's postcard.
keywords: 过去完成时,间接引语,转述陈述句,时间顺序,had + 过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: CHANGE OF SITUATION. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple to talk about situations which changed.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时：描述情况变化的用法
examples: After the show we had planned to go to the theatre restaurant. But it was closed.、We had planned to go to Switzerland, but unfortunately our car broke down. (Sweden; B2 VANTAGE; 1993; Swedish; Pass、At first she had wanted to make the first move but she wasn't quite convinced.
keywords: 过去完成时,情况变化,未实现计划,时间对比,转折连词

content: Guideword: USE: BACKGROUND INFORMATION, RELATIVE CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple in relative clauses to give background information.    ► relative clauses
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时在定语从句中提供背景信息
examples: After a while Mr and Mrs Landsbury, the couple who had organised the party, got everybody's attention and […] asked everybody to stay calm.、He went to the hotel because he wanted to find out who the person was that had sent him a mysterious letter…、[…] it was Annika who had arranged a huge party for her, and all her friends and family, at the airport.
keywords: 过去完成时,定语从句,背景信息,时间顺序,关系代词

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTS OF QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the past perfect simple to report questions, where the main verb in the reporting clause is in the past simple.  ► reported speech
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: past perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时在转述疑问句中的用法
examples: I asked him who had given him my phone number and he said it had been me.、He didn't find her, in spite of looking for her in every room of her house, so he decided to come to my house to ask me if I had seen her somewhere.、I asked her what had happened and she told me that my grandmother was very ill.
keywords: 过去完成时,间接引语,转述疑问句,时间顺序,had + 过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'yes/no', 'wh-', tag and negative question forms with an increasing range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 过去时一般疑问句：yes/no、wh-、附加与否定问句
examples: Are you still looking for a job or did you succeed in finding one?、When did you last see your wife and your children?、It was great to have met you, and we certainly had a terrific time together, didn't we?、Didn't you tell me that you had to go to Orleans today?、Why didn't you say something about it?
keywords: 过去时,一般疑问句,did,动词原形,wh-词

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form with a wide range of regular and irregular verbs.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时否定形式：didn't + 动词原形
examples: I didn't hesitate and went there straight away.、I'm sure it wasn't my fault as I didn't switch anything on or off at that moment.、… we really enjoyed our holiday even though things did not turn out they way we planned.
keywords: 一般过去时,否定形式,didn't,动词原形,不规则动词

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH SUBORDINATING CONJUNCTIONS. CanDo: Can use the past simple with a range of subordinating conjunctions, including 'as soon as', 'before', 'if', 'once', 'since', 'so', 'until', 'when', 'while'.
chinese_human_name: 过去简单时与从属连词的搭配使用
examples: … as soon as we went down to around 15 metres in depth, we saw a lot of coloured fish.、I told you about that terrible hotel I had stayed in before I came to visit you.、Once he got inside, he started searching for some clues to that horrible crime.
keywords: 过去简单时,从属连词,时态一致性,时间顺序,条件句

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH TIME ADJUNCTS. CanDo: Can use a range of time adjuncts with the past simple.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时：与时间状语搭配使用
examples: I also worked as a helper on a summer camp for primary schoolchildren in Canada last summer.、I can remember one which happened to me last year, during the Christmas holiday.、He worked hard for quite a long time to earn the money he needed.
trigger_lemmas: last summer、last year、for a long time、during the holiday
keywords: 一般过去时,时间状语,动词过去式,具体时间,时间段

content: Guideword: USE: POLITENESS: 'I WONDERED' AND 'I WANTED'. CanDo: Can use the past simple with 'I wondered' and 'I wanted' as politeness structures, when making polite requests and thanking.
chinese_human_name: 过去式礼貌表达：用I wondered和I wanted进行礼貌请求与感谢
examples: So, I wondered if you could introduce me to somebody who knows how to use a camera, so that I will be able to record my trip for you.、I wanted to know if the rooms are single or double, if they have showers and if there is room service. … Secondly, I also wanted to know if there is a gym in the hotel …、First of all, I wanted to thank you for giving me the first prize in your competition.
keywords: 过去简单时态,礼貌表达,I wondered,I wanted,间接请求

content: Guideword: USE: POLITENESS AFTER 'IF'. CanDo: Can use the past simple after 'if' as a politeness structure, especially in letters and emails.
chinese_human_name: 过去式在'if'后的礼貌用法：书信邮件中的委婉表达
examples: I think it would be very helpful if I told you my own case.、It would be great if you sent me a free copy of the next edition of The Student Tourist Guidebook.、I would be grateful if you gave me this job.
trigger_lemmas: if you、would be grateful、it would be great、i would appreciate
keywords: 过去式,if从句,礼貌表达,虚拟语气,书面语

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use the present perfect continuous with adverbs in the normal mid position.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时与副词搭配：中位副词的使用
examples: I have just been reading an article in your newspaper this morning, about The Westfield Music Festival.、I've also been singing in a choir for five years, so I'm very familiar with it.、You have already been complaining about headaches and insomia.
keywords: 现在完成进行时,中位副词,持续性动作,时间状语,动词-ing形式

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时否定形式：have/has not been doing
examples: I hope that I have not been wasting your time and giving you too much trouble.、Hope you haven't been working too hard!、The heating system has not been working properly since your staff completed the work in my house.
trigger_lemmas: hope that、working too hard、not been working
keywords: 现在完成进行时,否定形式,have not been doing,持续动作,时间状语

content: Guideword: USE: RECENT PAST. CanDo: Can use the present perfect continuous to focus on a finished activity in the recent past but where the effects or results are still important or relevant.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 现在完成进行时：强调近期已完成活动的影响
examples: They might be slippery when it has been snowing.
keywords: 现在完成进行时,近期完成,持续影响,动态动词,原因状语

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form with an increasing range of verbs.
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时疑问句：如何正确提问
examples: How has your family been?、But what have these animals done?、In 1970 people in the UK married in their early 20s, but nowadays they marry at the end of their 20s. But why has this changed?
trigger_lemmas: how has、what have、why has、have you ever
keywords: 现在完成时,疑问句,过去分词,助动词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'STILL'. CanDo: Can use the negative form of the present perfect simple with 'still' to emphasise that something that was expected to happen continues not to happen.  ► adverbs
category: SuperCategory: PAST. SubCategory: present perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时否定式与still连用：强调预期未发生之事
examples: I still haven't read the role but when I read it, I was very excited and I accepted Mr Brown's offer.、You asked me whether I bought a computer or a bicycle and I have to tell you that I still haven't decided.
keywords: 现在完成时,否定式,still,副词,持续未发生

content: Guideword: FORM: INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use the passive infinitive affirmative and negative forms after an increasing range of main verbs, modal verbs, adjectives and nouns, in impersonal constructions.
chinese_human_name: 被动不定式：肯定与否定形式
examples: According to your advertisement, some training is supposed to be given.、My composition was ready to be printed and I was searching for a piece of paper…、I would prefer to sleep in a tent because I have never done it and I think it is an experience not to be missed, a very original adventure!、The reason that I took part in your research was to help youngsters not to be addicted to computer games …、For one, the future homes might not be built out of bricks at all!
trigger_lemmas: be supposed to、be ready to、not to be、to help
keywords: 被动不定式,to be + 过去分词,非人称结构,肯定与否定形式,语法搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST PERFECT SIMPLE, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the past perfect passive affirmative form.
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时被动语态肯定式：had been + 过去分词
examples: The car had been serviced and everything seemed to be all right.、At this moment, Lime walked in and realised he had been set up.
keywords: 过去完成时被动语态,had been,过去分词,被动动作,时间关系

content: Guideword: FORM: MODAL PERFECT. CanDo: Can use the present perfect simple affirmative and negative forms with modal verbs to refer to the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词+现在完成时被动语态：could have been done
examples: I think that all these problems could have been avoided and that asking for my money back is the best way of forgetting that evening.、I don't remember how I lost it, it might have been stolen.、Of course, some groups were better than others but I think they all played well and have talent: they should have been given a chance!、It should not have been used in this kind of article.
trigger_lemmas: could have been、might have been、should have been、should not have been
keywords: 情态动词,现在完成时,被动语态,过去推测,could have been done

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST CONTINUOUS AFFIRMATIVE.. CanDo: Can use the past continuous passive affirmative.
chinese_human_name: 过去进行时被动语态肯定式
examples: However, to my disappointment, the restaurant was closed because it was being redecorated.、After they explained everything to him, he then knew he was being tricked by them and that this was supposed to be a special experience for him.、We thought that as you lived there, we could go to your house and stay there while the car was being repaired.
keywords: 过去进行时被动语态,was/were being,过去分词,被动动作,进行时态

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST SIMPLE NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use past simple passive negative.
chinese_human_name: 一般过去时被动语态否定式：was/were not + 过去分词
examples: What is worse, the ticket price was not reduced despite the fact that I showed my student ID.、I had to go to the hospital because my back hurt so badly, and I wasn't allowed to work for two weeks.、I was really disappointed because a lot of things were not done.、Some say that studying animals would be impossible, if they weren't kept in zoos …
trigger_lemmas: was not、were not、not allowed、not done、not reduced
keywords: 被动语态,一般过去时,否定式,was not,were not,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST PERFECT SIMPLE, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the past perfect passive negative form.
chinese_human_name: 过去完成时被动语态否定形式：had not been + 过去分词
examples: [talking about a car] In fact, it hadn't been stolen, it had been taken by a man and his wife, because their car broke down and because she was about to have her baby …、We waited for ages because we had not been informed.
trigger_lemmas: had not been、hadn't been、by then、before that
keywords: 过去完成时,被动语态,否定形式,had not been,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT CONTINUOUS, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present continuous passive affirmative with an increasing range of verbs.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时被动语态：肯定句形式
examples: This year's topic is the online training for employees, which is being relaunched .、The global temperature is rising, the ice is melting, the sea level increases and miles and miles of coast are being submerged.、The first thing to be linked through computers was academic knowledge, then came commercial businesses, naturally, and now, people are being linked through billions of personal computers.
keywords: 被动语态,现在进行时,肯定句,进行时被动,动词过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT CONTINUOUS, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present continuous passive negative.
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时被动语态否定式：are/is not being + 过去分词
examples: … students are not being educated equally.、To conclude, in my opinion, it is important to keep as many languages as possible alive, so we can make sure that part of the human history is not being lost.、Firstly, the fact of different kinds of animals are in a zoo, doesn't means that they aren't being treated right.
trigger_lemmas: not being treated、not being educated、not being lost、not being reviewed
keywords: 现在进行时被动语态,否定式,being,过去分词,未完成动作

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT PERFECT SIMPLE, AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present perfect passive affirmative form (often in the context of reporting).  ► reported speech
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时被动语态肯定式：用于报告和转述
examples: I have been asked to write a report about an accident which happened to me last Saturday.、I am writing to you to give you further information about the conference organization and about the arrangements which have been made for your group of students.
trigger_lemmas: have been asked、have been made、have been reported、have been completed
keywords: 现在完成时被动语态,肯定式,报告,转述,have been asked

content: Guideword: USE: SUMMARIES AND EVALUATIONS. CanDo: Can use the passive with modal verbs to evaluate or summarise.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词被动语态：用于总结与评价
examples: In conclusion, it can be seen that the bicycle is more suitable for those who are living in a little town or in the country.、Next, I find that our streets are not very clean, another major problem, and I think something must be done about it.
trigger_lemmas: can be seen、must be done、should be improved、could be considered
keywords: 情态动词被动语态,总结,评价,客观表达,正式场合

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH VERBS TAKING TWO OBJECTS, , WITH PREPOSITIONAL PHRASE. CanDo: Can use the passive with a range of tenses and verbs needing two objects (e.g. give, offer, sell) with the direct object in subject position and the indirect object in a prepositional phrase.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态：双宾语动词的被动形式（直接宾语作主语）
examples: Your name was given to me by a member of yours, Allan Westwood, whom I met last week.、If more training is given to staff, they will be interested in their work  and staff turnover will be reduced.、Unfortunately an interview for a job in the New Palace Hotel has been offered to me at the same time as your class.
keywords: 被动语态,双宾语动词,直接宾语,间接宾语,介词短语

content: Guideword: USE: WITH 'WILL', FUTURE REFERENCE. CanDo: Can use the passive with 'will' to talk about the future.
chinese_human_name: 被动语态与will连用：表达未来事件
examples: Just to let you know you will be booked into the Palace Hotel …、Dear Mr Bixon, First of all, I am very grateful to hear that the cinema will be renovated next year.
trigger_lemmas: will be、will be completed、will be sent、will be held
keywords: 被动语态,will,未来时态,过去分词,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH MODAL VERBS. CanDo: Can use the passive with modal verbs in a range of contexts, with a variety of subjects.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词被动语态：should be done, could be improved
examples: Architects should be hired to design parks, where people could go for a walk or have a picnic.、Although I had a marvellous time, I believe there are a few things that could be improved for next year's festival.、As a result, today, it could be said that nearly everyone is living in a digital world which means computers are necessary and very important.
keywords: 情态动词,被动语态,should be done,could be improved,must be completed

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH VERBS TAKING TWO OBJECTS.. CanDo: Can use the passive with a wide range of verbs needing two objects, putting the indirect object in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 双宾语动词的被动语态：间接宾语作主语
examples: I was very happy to hear that you have been offered two jobs, one in a restaurant and one in a museum.、[talking about a music contract] She was offered a contract to record a single.、First of all, I felt happy and pleased that your firm has been given some extra money to spend on improvements to the cinema next year.
keywords: 双宾语动词,被动语态,间接宾语,直接宾语,be + 过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: PRESENT PERFECT SIMPLE, NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the present perfect passive negative form (often in the context of reporting). ► reported speech
chinese_human_name: 现在完成时被动语态否定形式：has/have not been + 过去分词
examples: …the old-fashioned house which has not been used for twenty years is not a very attractive sight from our town either.、This happened two years ago, and the necklace hasn't been found yet …
trigger_lemmas: hasn't been、haven't been、not been used、not been found
keywords: 现在完成时被动语态,否定形式,has not been,have not been,未完成报告

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'HAVE' + OBJ + '-ED', PROACTIVE PASSIVE. CanDo: Can use have + object + -ed to talk about something where the speaker is in a pro-active or a passive role.
category: SuperCategory: PASSIVES. SubCategory: get and have
chinese_human_name: 主动/被动表达：have + 宾语 + -ed 结构
examples: After I left you on Monday, I had my car serviced and visited Washington with its wonderful memorials.、It's such a shame that I'm having my room redecorated but, in my view, the garden will be perfect.、My plans fell through because I had my purse stolen and I had no money to continue my journey.、The other reason against going to work by bike in a big city is that the risk of having your bike stolen is bigger.、I had just played in the best team of Sao Paulo but I had to stop because I had my leg broken in a car crash.
trigger_lemmas: have something done、have something stolen、have something broken
keywords: have + 宾语 + -ed,主动被动表达,安排某事,经历某事,过去分词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'GET' + REFLEXIVE PRONOUN + '-ED'. CanDo: Can use a reflexive pronoun with the 'get'-passive.
category: SuperCategory: PASSIVES. SubCategory: get and have
chinese_human_name: 被动语态：'get' + 反身代词 + '-ed' 结构
examples: Although to drive a car you must be very careful because you could get yourself killed if you don't drive carefully enough.、Although he has a charming personality he uses it to get himself involved in illegal activities.
keywords: get-被动语态,反身代词,过去分词,自我引发,口语表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'GET' + OBJECT + 'TO'-INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'get' + object + 'to'-infinitive to talk about causing someone to do something.
category: SuperCategory: PASSIVES. SubCategory: get and have
chinese_human_name: 使役结构：get + 宾语 + to-不定式
examples: I would like to point at a few things about our small town, which I, as a citizen, have to explain to our friends, in order to get them to visit us more frequently.、It is a good way to get them to shop at this particular store.、I do understand that it must be difficult to get these people to go to the festival.
trigger_lemmas: get to、get someone to、get them to
keywords: 使役结构,get,to-不定式,宾语,劝说

content: Guideword: FORM: POSSESSION WITH PLURAL NOUNS  + '. CanDo: Can form noun phrases with plural nouns + ' + noun.
chinese_human_name: 复数名词所有格：复数名词 + ' + 名词
examples: He had promised that he would go to his grandparents' house this afternoon.、Our company is a digital company with 15 years' experience.、It is essential to introduce special offers to get customers' attention.
keywords: 复数名词,所有格,名词短语,所属关系,时间表达

content: Guideword: FORM: NOUN + 'OF' + POSSESSIVE DETERMINER + NOUN. CanDo: Can form noun phrases with noun + 'of' + possessive determiner + noun + '‘s', particularly with 'friend' or 'friends'.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语：名词 + 'of' + 物主限定词 + 名词 + '’s' 结构
examples: Actually, I know a great one and they can make a little discount for us because the owner is a friend of my father's.
keywords: 名词短语,物主限定词,'’s' 所属格,朋友关系,特定成员

content: Guideword: FORM: POSTMODIFYING WITH ADJECTIVE PHRASE. CanDo: Can form complex noun phrases by using adjective phrases as postmodifiers to give more information about the noun.
chinese_human_name: 名词短语后置修饰：形容词短语作后置定语
examples: Besides, we could leave one day in the morning and go by boat to a small and exotic island full of different and exotic species of birds that we could observe and photograph.、Emily Brönte succeeded in writing a romantic, psychological and tragic story, beautifully set in these mysterious moors.
keywords: 后置定语,形容词短语,名词短语,介词短语,复杂修饰

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX NOUN PHRASES WITH ADJECTIVES COMBINED WITH 'BUT'. CanDo: Can form an increasing range of complex noun phrases with more than one adjective combined with 'but'.
chinese_human_name: 复杂名词短语：用'but'连接多个形容词
examples: I am very lucky, because I was born in a small but beautiful city called Neuva Helvecia.、As a result, in order to find out which is the most important, you need to ask yourself a simple but tricky question that no man would like to be asked.、The smoke in the air had a strong but good smell.、I will be on business in London to sign a contract with a new but significant customer at that time.
trigger_lemmas: small but beautiful、simple but tricky、strong but good、new but significant
keywords: 复杂名词短语,形容词连接,but转折,对比修饰,B2语法

content: Guideword: FORM'-ING' FORMS, SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use the '-ing' form of verbs as nouns in subject position.
chinese_human_name: 动词-ing形式作主语：动名词主语用法
examples: Working until midnight every evening is not reasonable. Working late is not the solution and it is even dangerous.、Also, think about stress. Driving in a city is stressful.、First of all, Wicklow Mountains Centre is the perfect place for climbing. Climbing is our favourite hobby and, I think, we will have a good time.、Many people say that they just don't have time for thinking about their health. Living in today's world demands spending a lot of time working.
trigger_lemmas: working late、driving in a city、climbing、living in today's world
keywords: 动名词,主语位置,-ing形式,单数谓语,抽象概念

content: Guideword: FORM: NO ARTICLE. CanDo: Can use uncountable nouns without a definite article to refer to an abstract thing in general.
chinese_human_name: 不可数名词泛指抽象概念：无冠词用法
examples: Television is more attractive because it has moving images.、Music was her life, not only a hobby.、Look at it this way, the more you work in school, the more you will achieve in your job. Education is important to prevent you from being a dog on a leash!、Language can be learned slowly and reflects the culture and tradition of the country. Language even plays an important role in the tourist industry.
keywords: 不可数名词,无冠词,抽象概念,泛指,一般性陈述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT', EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use uncontracted 'not' for emphasis or in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 否定词'not'的非缩写形式：强调与正式用法
examples: Do not take on too many assignments at a time.、I cannot agree with you Mr Brown.、Keeping them in zoos will not help them.
keywords: 否定词,非缩写形式,强调,正式语境,助动词,情态动词

content: Guideword: FORM: 'NEITHER OF', 'NONE OF' + PRONOUN. CanDo: Can use negative forms 'neither of' and 'none of' + pronoun or noun phrase with the affirmative form of the verb.
chinese_human_name: 否定表达：'neither of'与'none of' + 代词/名词短语
examples: Neither of us is liable in this case.、Moreover, none of my friends are interested therefore there is no one I can talk to.、We even met a French group and as none of them spoke English, we stayed with them to translate what they were asked.
keywords: 否定表达,neither of,none of,代词,动词肯定形式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NEITHER … NOR'. CanDo: Can use 'neither … nor' to connect two words, phrases or clauses, often to give emphasis or focus.
chinese_human_name: 否定连接结构：neither … nor
examples: Neither you nor I would like that.、We can neither eat nor drink during the lessons.、I have neither climbed nor surfed before, so that would be very exciting for me.
keywords: 否定连接,并列结构,动词一致,强调否定,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NEVER', INVERTED FRONT POSITION, FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'never' in front position followed by an inverted subject (most commonly 'I') + main verb, to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 否定副词'never'前置倒装结构：强调表达
examples: Never have I seen such a realistic and impressive film before.、Never had I thought that my parents would do this to me.
trigger_lemmas: never have i、never had i、never did i
keywords: never,倒装语序,强调表达,否定副词,正式语境

content: Guideword: FORM: 'IT' + LINKING VERB + ADJECTIVES + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'it' + linking verb + adjective + ('that') clause.
chinese_human_name: 形式主语结构：It + 系动词 + 形容词 + (that)从句
examples: It seems clear to me that swimming is good for the whole body.、It is obvious that some people prefer reading books.、It is possible that we can be educated by TV.、It seems obvious that it is not necessary.
trigger_lemmas: it is clear、it seems obvious、it is possible
keywords: 形式主语,系动词,形容词,that从句,主观判断

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IT' + LINKING VERB + ADJECTIVES + CLAUSE, HEDGING. CanDo: Can use 'it' + linking verb + adjective + ('that') clause to make an assertion less direct.
chinese_human_name: 间接断言句型：It + 系动词 + 形容词 + (that)从句
examples: It does not seem possible that we can live without any private life.、It is likely that by reading books we will learn some new words and phrases so that we will be able to write better.、It is possible that only one computer will do this. (Moldova (Republic of); B2 VANTAGE; 2000; Russian; Pass)
trigger_lemmas: it is possible、it is likely、it seems、it appears
keywords: 间接断言,形式主语,系动词,形容词从句,软化语气

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'IT' + LINKING VERB + ADJECTIVES + ('THAT') CLAUSE, FOCUS. CanDo: Can use 'it' + linking verb + adjective + ('that') clause as a focusing device.
chinese_human_name: 强调句型：It + 系动词 + 形容词 + (that)从句
examples: It is clear that we can't live without computers today.、It seems obvious that this oil comes from the gas station.、Computers became part of the human life style because they help us to make our lives easier, but it is clear that we should never depend on machines to handle our lives.、Due to the introduction of a new staff appraisal form, it is crucial that you take part.、It's obvious you can't ride forty kilometres twice a day, unless you're very sporty.、It is essential that you know the advantages of our new product in order to sell this bag efficiently.
trigger_lemmas: it is clear、it seems obvious、it is crucial
keywords: 形式主语,系动词,形容词,that从句,强调句型

content: Guideword: FORM: SUBJECT + 'BE' + ADJECTIVE + 'TO' + INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use pronoun or noun + 'be' + adjective + 'to' + (past) infinitive.
chinese_human_name: 形容词+to不定式结构：表达可能性与确定性
examples: They are unlikely to arrive on Friday.、We are sure to increase our turnover and at least our profit.、Whenever money is involved, some problems are likely to happen.、If you see a movie, it is likely to have been made with computers.
trigger_lemmas: be likely to、be unlikely to、be sure to、to have been
keywords: 形容词+to不定式,可能性表达,确定性表达,过去不定式,主语搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'can' with an increasing range of adverbs (including 'easily', 'hardly', 'now', 'probably', 'sometimes', 'still') in the normal mid position after the modal verb or after the subject in questions.  ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can与副词搭配：中位副词用法
examples: In case you need them , I can easily provide references.、On the other hand you can hardly imagine an evening when you are sitting in your armchair, the tea is on the table and you are reading your favourite novel on a computer screen.、As you read her book, you can probably imagine what kind of personality she has got, and after finishing it, you will be more cheerful than before.
keywords: 情态动词,副词,中位副词,词序,can hardly

content: Guideword: USE: GENERAL TRUTHS AND TENDENCIES. CanDo: Can use 'can' to talk about general truths and tendencies.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can：表达普遍真理和一般倾向
examples: …some young people can feel bored when they have to walk a lot and look at […] very old things.、Too much work can cause "stress" and heart problems.
trigger_lemmas: can feel、can cause、can lead to、can result in
keywords: 情态动词,普遍真理,一般倾向,可能性,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: GUESSES AND PREDICTIONS. CanDo: Can use the negative forms of 'can't' and 'cannot' to guess, predict and deduce.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can的否定形式：用于猜测、预测和推断
examples: You look very pale and you can’t be feeling well.、I think that it can’t be true.、[talking about someone suspected of being a criminal] He can't be; he is too young.、It cannot be any good for these animals to be taken away from their natural surroundings.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,猜测,预测,推断,can't,cannot

content: Guideword: USE: REPROACHES AND APPEALS. CanDo: Can use negative forms of 'can' to make reproaches or appeals.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词can的否定形式：表达责备与劝诫
examples: You can’t forget your friends.、…he can't go on behaving like this.、Please, listen, you can't go on studying so hard.、You have to realise that you cannot work all the time: your body needs some rest.、Can't you see how exhausted you are?
trigger_lemmas: can't go on、can't forget、cannot work、can't you see
keywords: 情态动词,can否定形式,责备,劝诫,can't go on

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use negative form dare not and daren't +  infinitive without to.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词dare的否定形式：dare not/daren't + 不带to的不定式
examples: [talking about a restaurant] But many local people dare not go to Lily, because it is too expensive.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,dare not,daren't,不带to的不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use affirmative form dare + infinitive without to.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词dare的肯定形式：dare + 不带to的不定式
examples: I can cook if you dare eat it!
trigger_lemmas: dare say、if you dare、how dare you
keywords: 情态动词,dare,肯定形式,不带to的不定式,勇气表达

content: Guideword: USE: BRAVADO. CanDo: Can use semi-modal 'dare' to talk about being brave enough to do something.
chinese_human_name: 半情态动词dare：表达勇气与胆量
examples: Some people object that I have to put up with the rain and other inconveniences, but I think that they are rather jealous because they daren't give up their car.
keywords: 半情态动词,勇气,胆量,daren't,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE' EXPRESSIONS + INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use the full range of expressions with 'be' + infinitive ('be likely to', 'be due to', 'be meant to', 'be bound to', 'be sure to', 'be certain to', 'be obliged to') with present and past forms of 'be' and with modal 'will' .
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: BE+不定式表达：可能性与义务的固定搭配
examples: People who read books are likely to be more knowledgeable.、I'm bound to feel nervous.、According to our new marketing strategy, we are sure to increase our turnover and our profit.、[talking about a new job] I am due to start on Monday 4 June. (Georgia (Republic of); B2 VANTAGE; 2007; Georgian; Fail)、I would like to inform you that as of 1st of June all operational staff will be obliged to use identity cards.、Sleepy and unwilling to take part of the conference, I was obliged to spend the evening listening to the soft voice of a man who was famous for his boring performances.
trigger_lemmas: be likely to、be due to、be meant to、be bound to、be sure to、be certain to、be obliged to
keywords: be likely to,be due to,be meant to,be bound to,be sure to,be certain to,be obliged to,不定式,情态表达

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE MEANT TO', IDEAL STATES. CanDo: Can use 'be meant to' to talk about ideal states.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 表达理想状态的短语：be meant to
examples: Animals are meant to be free, and man should be very careful about interfering with nature.、Primary school is meant to be there so that you build all the basics of your education.
keywords: be meant to,理想状态,设计意图,预期目的,不定式结构

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE DUE TO', 'BE TO', SCHEDULES. CanDo: Can use 'be due to' and, more formally, 'be to' to talk about things that are scheduled or expected.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 表达预定与预期的结构：be due to 与 be to
examples: I have attached the … company law directive enacted 2 years ago and which is due to be implemented by 2008.、The programme was due to start at midday.、I am sorry that I cannot attend the meeting at head office as expected, as I am to go on a business trip to New York then.、I was to take exams in two weeks and had to study hard.
trigger_lemmas: be due to、be to、due to start、to be implemented
keywords: 预定事件,正式安排,时间表达,动词原形,时态变化

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE LIKELY TO', PROBABILITY. CanDo: Can use 'be' (+modifier) 'likely to' to talk about probability.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 表达可能性的结构：be likely to
examples: And whenever money is involved, some problems are likely to happen.、I am very likely to make mistakes which I would like to avoid.
keywords: 可能性,概率,be likely to,修饰语,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'BE MORE/LESS LIKELY', COMPARISON. CanDo: Can use '(much) more/less' to modify 'likely' in a comparison.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 比较可能性表达：be more/less likely
examples: In case of an accident, one is more likely to be badly injured when riding a bicycle.、Since they are more and better educated when they leave school at 18 years old, their minds are more mature and they are more sensible. They are more likely to have better jobs and a better life, and much less likely to cause problems to other people.
trigger_lemmas: be more likely、be less likely、much more likely、far less likely
keywords: 可能性比较,比较级,情态表达,likely,more/less likely

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE SUPPOSED TO', HEARSAY. CanDo: Can use 'be supposed to' to talk about hearsay or supposition.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 情态表达：be supposed to 表示传闻或推测
examples: That woman is supposed to have killed her husbands (at least two), because she wanted their money.、The lake is supposed to be very beautiful.
trigger_lemmas: be supposed to、not supposed to、supposed to have
keywords: be supposed to,传闻,推测,情态表达,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE BOUND TO', CERTAINTY. CanDo: Can use 'be' (+ modifier) 'bound to' to talk about something certain or inevitable.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 表达必然性的短语：be bound to
examples: I assure you that it is bound to be popular with different clients, especially young people and white-collar workers.、It is hardly possible to catch a cold when travelling by car in rain which is almost bound to happen while riding a bicycle.、To sum up, where many people get together, problems are bound to arise.
trigger_lemmas: be bound to、bound to、almost bound to
keywords: 必然性,确定性,be bound to,不可避免,固定短语

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE' + ADJECTIVE + 'THAT'. CanDo: Can use 'be' + 'obvious/sure/likely/certain' followed by a 'that'-clause.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: BE + 形容词 + THAT 从句：表达确定性或可能性
examples: It is about 1000 years old, so I am sure that you will find it fascinating to see it.、It was obvious that I would be late to work.、It is likely that by reading books we will learn some new words and phrases so that we will be able to write better.、It is certain that our state-of-the-art LCD will be well received and make great profits.
keywords: be sure that,be likely that,be certain that,be obvious that,that 从句

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE SUPPOSED TO', OBLIGATION, EXPECTATION. CanDo: Can use 'be supposed to' to talk about expectation or obligation.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 情态表达：be supposed to 的用法（义务与期望）
examples: However, the show is only on the 14th of March, the same day we are supposed to go to a Science Museum.、Our travels are supposed to provide us with pleasure, knowledge and new experiences.、I have bought some disks but I don't know what I am supposed to do with them.、I was supposed to explain to them what they had to do.
trigger_lemmas: be supposed to、supposed to、not supposed to
keywords: be supposed to,义务,期望,情态表达,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: IMPERATIVE. CanDo: Can use the imperative form 'be sure to', to express obligation.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 祈使句表达义务：be sure to
examples: If you cannot attend, be sure to inform me in advance.、Be sure to contact me for any further information.
trigger_lemmas: be sure to、be sure not to
keywords: 祈使句,义务表达,be sure to,正式语气,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE SURE/CERTAIN TO'. CanDo: Can use 'be sure to', 'be certain to' to talk about certainty.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 表达确定性的短语：be sure to / be certain to
examples: A person that will act in that way is sure to be successful.、Furthermore, by bicycle, you don't spend your time in traffic-jams and you are sure to arrive at work on time.、The market for this product is not yet fully developed, but we are certain to attract more and more people, especially students.
