keywords: be sure to,be certain to,确定性,预测,不定式

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE FORCED TO', OBLIGATION. CanDo: Can use 'be forced to' to talk about an unnamed obligation, where the circumstances are beyond the control of the speaker/writer.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 被动义务表达：be forced to 的用法
examples: I don't like to be forced to do something that I don't want to do.、Due to decreasing sales over the last months, we are forced to cut the budget.
keywords: 被动义务,被迫,外部因素,无名义务,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE OBLIGED TO', OBLIGATION. CanDo: Can use 'be obliged to' to talk about an external obligation, especially in institutional contexts.
category: SuperCategory: MODALITY. SubCategory: expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 表达外部义务的短语：be obliged to
examples: The Sales Representatives are obliged to participate.、By January 2 everybody is obliged to have a parking permit when using the company car park.、They were obliged to give up their house.
keywords: 外部义务,正式语境,机构规定,法律强制,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: SUGGESTION. CanDo: Can use 'you (have) got to' to make a strong suggestion.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词have (got) to：表达强烈建议的用法
examples: If you think you have seen almost everything in this world, you've got to see this museum.、[talking about a famous actor] You have to see at least one of her films … I think if you haven't seen her films, you haven't lived at all!、You have to relax. You should try to live. You don't know what's going on around you.、The main thing to remember is that there many possibilities but you have to try to find them and not just say: "I want to work and earn money".
trigger_lemmas: you have to、you've got to、you gotta
keywords: have to,have got to,强烈建议,情态动词,口语推荐

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'may' with an increasing range of adverbs (most commonly 'even', 'only', 'already', 'never', 'just', 'sometimes') in the normal mid-position after the modal verb. ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may与副词搭配：even、only、already等副词的中位用法
examples: When you're reading books, you may even find words you don't know and if you're an interested person, you will try to find out what it means, thus improving your vocabulary.、Think of all the children living in cities, they may never get the chance to come near any animals at all.
keywords: 情态动词,副词,中位位置,可能性,词序

content: Guideword: USE: COMMAND. CanDo: Can use 'may I' to make a polite request, command or suggestion in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的礼貌请求用法：May I...
examples: May I have your attention please?、May I ask you to use e-mail or postal services whenever possible?、In terms of how we are going to travel around while we are there, may I suggest that we use the two bicycles that are at the house?
trigger_lemmas: may i、may i have、may i ask、may i suggest
keywords: 情态动词may,礼貌请求,正式场合,May I结构,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: PAST AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'may have' + '-ed' to talk about possibility in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的过去肯定式：may have + 过去分词
examples: I think that he may have forgiven me for that accident … !、As you may have noticed, there has been a delay setting up the new computer system.、[talking about buying something online] Another disadvantage is that you may have received the wrong size or colour.、Now, you may have seen your beautiful blue vase is not in your room any more; I broke it …!
trigger_lemmas: may have noticed、may have seen、may have received、may have forgiven
keywords: 情态动词,过去可能性,推测语气,过去分词,委婉表达

content: Guideword: USE: POLITE REQUEST. CanDo: Can use 'may I' to make a polite request for permission.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的礼貌请求用法：may I
examples: Sir, may I come in?、May I ask you if your special offer will be still available in September?、May I speak to Miss Wright, please?
trigger_lemmas: may i、may i ask、may i have、may i use
keywords: may I,礼貌请求,情态动词,请求许可,正式场合

content: Guideword: USE: FOCUSING. CanDo: Can use 'may' in phrases such as as 'you may know', or 'as you may have' + '-ed' to focus the reader on shared knowledge.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的聚焦用法：as you may know/have + -ed
examples: I usually take more than one book because, as you may know, it takes many hours to get there.、As you may have heard, I am going to change to the engineering department.、As you may have understood, the best opportunity to take photos will be during the performance, but you might also find backstage photos intresting.
trigger_lemmas: as you may know、as you may have heard、as you may have understood
keywords: 情态动词may,聚焦用法,as引导从句,共享知识,推测性表达

content: Guideword: USE: OPINION. CanDo: Can use 'may … but' to express an unexpected point of view.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词may的转折用法：may … but表达意外观点
examples: This may surprise you but I've managed to lose some weight, which I'm proud of.、[talking about cleaning musical instruments] You may think that it is quite boring but it is not.
keywords: may,but,转折,意外观点,情态动词

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use the question form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的疑问句形式：如何正确提问
examples: Is it possible to use the prize next year or must I cancel my trip to India?、Finally, how much money must I bring with me?
keywords: 情态动词,must,疑问句,必要性,义务,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use 'must have' + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的过去肯定式：must have + 过去分词
examples: When I realized that he must have forgotten, I called him up.、We had lots of fun learning how to ski. It was pretty hard at the beginning. I must have fallen about fifty times.
trigger_lemmas: must have、must have been、must have had
keywords: must have,过去分词,肯定推测,情态动词,过去事件

content: Guideword: USE: EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use the fixed expression 'I must say' to give emphasis, usually about something positive.
chinese_human_name: 强调性固定表达：I must say
examples: I must say that I'm most delighted to have you here with us, Mr. Saramago, and it's with enormous pleasure that my students will hear your words.、As I like music a lot I went to as many concerts as possible, and I must say that they were superb.
keywords: 固定表达,强调语气,积极评价,that 省略,情感增强

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH ADVERBS. CanDo: Can use 'must' with an increasing range of adverbs (including 'all', 'never', 'strongly', 'first') in the normal mid position after the modal verb. ► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must与副词搭配：must + 副词结构
examples: To sum up, we must all act immediately because the existence of humanity may be in danger.、But there is one, just one thing we must never forget: we have to be authentic.、[talking about a guide book] In addition I must strongly recommend you add something about nightlife.
keywords: 情态动词,副词,must all,must never,must strongly

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATION AND NECESSITY. CanDo: Can use 'must' to ask about obligation and necessity.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must：询问义务与必要性
examples: Is it possible to use the prize next year or must I cancel my trip to India?、Finally, how much money must I bring with me?
trigger_lemmas: must i、how much must、or must i
keywords: 情态动词,义务,必要性,疑问句,must

content: Guideword: USE: DEDUCTIONS AND CONCLUSIONS. CanDo: Can use the perfect form of 'must' to make deductions about the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的完成式：表示对过去的推测与结论
examples: Of course, India must have changed a lot since Jules Verne wrote his book, but I think that its charm remains.、I must have looked awful because she asked me whether I was all right.
trigger_lemmas: must have、must have been、must have done、based on
keywords: must have,过去推测,情态动词完成式,逻辑结论,证据推断

content: Guideword: USE: CONCESSIONS. CanDo: Can use the fixed expression 'I must admit' or 'you must admit' to express concession.
chinese_human_name: 让步表达：固定短语 'I must admit' 和 'you must admit'
examples: On the other hand you must admit that not all ready-made meals taste really good and often they are not as healthy as fresh ones.、However, I must admit that I completely agree with Chris and consider the mountain road too daring to try.
trigger_lemmas: i must admit、you must admit、must admit
keywords: 让步表达,固定短语,must admit,客观性,辩论技巧

content: Guideword: USE: RULES. CanDo: Can use the negative forms of 'must' to talk about what is not permitted.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词must的否定形式：表示禁止或不允许
examples: You must not hit them or punish them without good reason if you do not want them to become your worst enemy.、They must not write on the walls.、In school for example, you mustn't talk during lessons, and you have to be on time.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,禁止,规则,must not,mustn't,不允许

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can use 'ought to' without a following verb where the previous main verb is understood. ► ellipsis
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought to的省略用法：省略后续动词
examples: Otherwise some students would not get as much specialised help as they ought to.
keywords: 情态动词,省略,ought to,比较句,语境推断

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATION AND NECESSITY. CanDo: Can use 'needn't to' talk about a lack of obligation.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词needn't：表达无义务或没必要
examples: I like summer so much because the weather is hot and we needn't wear a jacket.、[talking about preparing for a party] As for the music, you needn't worry about it.
keywords: 情态动词,needn't,无义务,没必要,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词need的否定形式：needn't与need not
examples: You needn't worry about where we can stay.、… when I send an e-mail, I need not worry about the time.、You needn't go out jogging in the evening because you have already had your exercise.
keywords: 情态动词,否定形式,needn't,need not,不必要性

content: Guideword: USE: DESIRED STATES. CanDo: Can use 'ought to' to talk about desired states of affairs.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词ought to：表达理想状态与应然之事
examples: Furthermore, we ought to take care of our health by going on trips to not unpolluted places as often as possible.、Of course not all zoos are as good as they ought to be, but today we know so much about the different animals that they don't have to get bored in the zoo and we're able to provide them with the environment they prefer.、There shouldn't be any rubbish dumps, all the rubbish ought to be recycled.
trigger_lemmas: ought to、ought to be、ought not to、ought to have
keywords: 情态动词,理想状态,应然之事,ought to be,道德责任

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can use 'should' and 'shouldn't' without a following verb where the previous main verb is understood.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的省略用法：省略后续动词
examples: Well, have you ever checked your blood pressure? I think you should.、John spent the rest of the day thinking about what he should do. in fact, he wanted to answer and meet her again, but he knew that he shouldn't.
keywords: 情态动词,省略,上下文,建议,简洁表达

content: Guideword: FORM: 'SHOULD BE' + '-ING'. CanDo: Can use 'should be' + '-ing'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的进行时态：should be + -ing
examples: Well, you should be bouncing up and down with joy (just kidding)!、These are the reasons that I believe we should be reading books instead of watching television in our free time and I believe many people believe the same thinks as I do.
keywords: 情态动词,进行时态,should be,动词-ing,当前建议

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATION. CanDo: Can use 'should be' + '-ing' to talk about present general obligation.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should：表示当前一般义务的进行时态用法
examples: Wild animals should be running free but I think that zoos today have an important role in keeping them alive.、Moreover if a car driver has drunk too many alcoholic drinks or is tired he shouldn't be driving.
keywords: 情态动词,should,进行时态,义务,当前一般义务

content: Guideword: USE: EXPECTATIONS. CanDo: Can use 'should be' + '-ing' to talk about expectations.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词should的进行时态：表达预期与推测
examples: The computer systems should be working again once you restart them.、However, I think that the situation should be improving in the next 6 months, especially during the third quarter of the year.、[talking about wedding protocol] The groom should be waiting at the entrance for the bride.
trigger_lemmas: should be working、should be improving、should be waiting
keywords: 情态动词,进行时态,预期表达,合理推测,should be + -ing

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS. CanDo: Can use 'used to' without a following verb where the previous main verb is understood. ► ellipsis
chinese_human_name: used to的省略用法：省略后续动词的惯用表达
examples: She doesn't travel as much as she used to.、I must admit that they did sound quite a lot better than they used to.
keywords: used to,省略用法,比较句,过去习惯,动词省略

content: Guideword: USE: REQUESTS. CanDo: Can use 'will' (particularly 'Will you please') to make requests and commands in a wide range of contexts.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词will的请求用法：Will you please...
examples: Will you please send me his name, address and telephone number.、Will you please inform me about the exact payment.、Will you pay attention!
keywords: 情态动词,will,请求,命令,Will you please

content: Guideword: USE: HABITUAL PAST. CanDo: Can use 'would' to talk about habitual actions and events in the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词would：描述过去的习惯性动作
examples: [talking about a job that the speaker did last year] In my opinion I worked very hard. I would spend a lot of hours at work.、[from a story about pirates] At night they would go to the rocky seaside and light a fire in order to deceive the boats and let them crash on the rocks.
trigger_lemmas: would spend、would go、would visit、in the past
keywords: 情态动词,过去习惯,would,动作重复,叙事用法

content: Guideword: FORM: PAST. CanDo: Can used 'could' have + '-ed'.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could的过去推测用法：could have + 过去分词
examples: In fact it could have been dangerous but it became funny and also an embarrassing moment in my life!、What could have happened?、I must confess that our teacher couldn't have picked anyone better to do it.
keywords: 情态动词,过去推测,could have,过去分词,假设语气

content: Guideword: USE: PAST POSSIBILITY. CanDo: Can used affirmative 'could' have + '-ed' to talk about past possibility.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could + have + 过去分词：表达过去可能性
examples: Alice was disappointed that her mother could have phoned her but she did not.、I think that all these problems could have been avoided and that asking my money back is the best way of forgetting that evening.、I was grateful to them because the ticket was so expensive that I couldn't have bought it.
trigger_lemmas: could have、couldn't have、if i had、at that time、last year
keywords: 情态动词,过去可能性,虚拟语气,遗憾表达,假设推测,could have done,过去分词

content: Guideword: USE: REGRET. CanDo: Can use 'could have' + '-ed' to talk about regrets.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could：表达遗憾的could have + -ed结构
examples: I wish I could have stayed, especially to help the children.、[someone reflecting on their performance as part of a team at work] I could have listened more to my team members and learned from the experienced ones.
trigger_lemmas: could have、wish i could have、if i could have
keywords: could have,过去分词,遗憾表达,未实现可能性,情态动词

content: Guideword: USE: PAST SPECULATION. CanDo: Can use 'could have' + '-ed' to speculate about the past.
chinese_human_name: 情态动词could的过去推测用法：could have + 过去分词
examples: I thought perhaps a thief could have entered my house.、… she could have ruined everything I had been preparing for almost four weeks.、If he had mugged her, who could have saved her?
keywords: 情态动词,过去推测,could have,虚拟语气,可能性表达

content: Guideword: USE: REPORTED SPEECH. CanDo: Can use 'could' as the past form of 'can' in reported speech.
chinese_human_name: 间接引语中could作为can的过去式用法
examples: I told them I couldn't go because I didn't have money, I wasn't honest!、The woman said she could put me up if I wanted, and led me to a house nearby.
keywords: 间接引语,reported speech,情态动词,过去式,时态一致

content: Guideword: USE: POLITENESS. CanDo: Can use the future continuous with 'will' as a polite question form, in place of the present simple or future simple.
chinese_human_name: 将来进行时礼貌问句：will be doing 的委婉用法
examples: Will I be needing any money?
trigger_lemmas: will you be needing、will i be requiring、will we be using
keywords: 将来进行时,礼貌问句,委婉语气,will be doing,替代用法

content: Guideword: FORM: QUESTIONS. CanDo: Can use 'yes/no' and 'wh-' question forms with 'will'.
chinese_human_name: 将来进行时疑问句：will be doing的疑问形式
examples: Will they be holding any activities at night?、Will I be needing any money?、What will you be doing in a few years if now you don't even try to do anything?
trigger_lemmas: will be、be doing、at night、in a few years
keywords: 将来进行时,疑问句,will be doing,进行时态,时间状语

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE ABOUT TO'. CanDo: Can use the present forms of 'be' + 'about to'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 将来时表达：be about to 结构
examples: You are not going to believe what I am about to tell you!、I'm in a hurry, my class is about to begin.、They are to offer the spectators a view of the variety and the beauty of the world we are surrounded by and which we are about to destroy.
trigger_lemmas: be about to、about to、not about to
keywords: be about to,将来时,即时动作,紧迫性,动词原形

content: Guideword: USE: SCHEDULES. CanDo: Can use 'be due to' and, more formally, 'be to' talk about things that are scheduled or expected.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 未来表达：用be due to和be to谈论预定或预期事件
examples: Our annual conference for HR managers is due to take place on 10 December 2010.、However, the demand for products is still estimated as ‘normal’ and is due to increase within the next 6 months.、I am sorry but we are to leave a bit earlier - at about 16.00.
keywords: 预定事件,正式安排,未来表达,be due to,be to,时间状语,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE TO'. CanDo: Can use the present form of 'be' + 'to'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 将来时表达：be to 结构
examples: Dear Erica, I am sorry that I cannot attend the meeting at head office as expected, as I am to go on a business trip to New York then.、He is to come to Athens next Friday.
keywords: be to,将来时,正式表达,计划安排,义务

content: Guideword: USE: OBLIGATIONS AND  INSTRUCTIONS WITH 'BE TO'. CanDo: Can use 'be to' talk about future obligations and to give instructions.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 未来表达：用be to表示义务和指令
examples: [talking about gorillas] We have no right to do so, because they are to be respected as much as any other living form on this planet!、They are to have their passports with them.、You're to sit in front of the TV and just watch the film.
keywords: be to,义务,指令,未来表达,正式语境

content: Guideword: USE: IMMEDIATE FUTURE WITH 'BE ABOUT TO'. CanDo: Can use 'be about to' to talk about the immediate future, often with 'just'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 将来时表达：用be about to表示即将发生的动作
examples: I know what you 're about to answer, and moreover you might be right;、We're about to introduce a new identity card system in our company.、My company has a high reputation for manufacturing healthy foods and we are just about to launch a newly-developed healthy snack for children which requires financial backing urgently.
trigger_lemmas: be about to、just about to、about to start、about to happen
keywords: be about to,immediate future,just about to,动词原形,即刻性

content: Guideword: FORM: 'BE DUE TO'. CanDo: Can use the present form of 'be' + 'due to'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future expressions with be
chinese_human_name: 未来表达：be due to 结构
examples: I am afraid that July is the only appropriate month, because I am due to start work in August.、As some of the members of our team are due to be present at a sales promotion programme next Friday, the marketing meeting once scheduled for next Friday is postponed to next Saturday.
trigger_lemmas: due to、be due to、due to start、due to arrive
keywords: be due to,未来表达,计划安排,截止日期,动词原形

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo:
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 将来完成进行时否定形式：will not have been doing
trigger_lemmas: will not have been、won't have been、by the time、for hours
keywords: 将来完成进行时,否定形式,持续动作,时间状语,动词-ing

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with 'will'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 将来完成进行时肯定式：will have been doing
examples: This summer I will have been working for three years for my company …
keywords: 将来完成进行时,肯定式,will have been doing,持续动作,将来时间点

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE ON THE POINT OF'. CanDo: Can use the simple past form of 'be' + 'on the point of' + '-ing' to talk about things that were expected to happen soon after a point in the past.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future in the past
chinese_human_name: 过去将来时态：be on the point of + -ing 结构
examples: In addition, when I was on the point of leaving the office, another phone rang.、In fact he simulated his death to escape from the police, who were on the point of catching him fora penicillin racket.
trigger_lemmas: be on the point of、was on the point of、were on the point of
keywords: 过去将来时,be on the point of,动词-ing形式,时态一致性,动作临近性

content: Guideword: USE: 'BE ABOUT TO'. CanDo: Can use the simple past form of 'be' + 'about to' (often with 'just') to talk about the immediate future from a point in the past.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future in the past
chinese_human_name: 过去将来时：be about to 的过去式用法
examples: Two days before, I told him that our father was about to buy a brand new car.、When I was about to answer the question, I realised that it was not as easy as I had thought.、Dear Helen, Believe it or not, I was just about to write you a letter when I received yours.、Just as we were about to climb through the broken window, a policeman arrived on the scene.
trigger_lemmas: was about to、were about to、just about to
keywords: 过去将来时,be about to,was/were about to,just,即将发生

content: Guideword: USE: LOOKING BACK FROM A POINT IN THE FUTURE. CanDo: Can use the future perfect continuous to look back to the past from a point in the future and to emphasise the duration of an activity or event.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect continuous
chinese_human_name: 将来完成进行时：从未来某点回顾过去并强调持续时间
examples: Now I am staying in Hastings in England and this month, I will have been studying English for seven months.、I think I could have a holiday just in July because I will have been working for my company for one year by the end of the June.
trigger_lemmas: by the end of、for、by then、by next year
keywords: 将来完成进行时,持续时间,未来时间点,动词-ing形式,by短语

content: Guideword: FORM: AFFIRMATIVE. CanDo: Can use the affirmative form with 'will'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 将来完成时肯定式：will have + 过去分词
examples: I'm sure I will have learned today's lesson by the next lesson.、It seems that the decorative role of clothes will have disappeared by the year 2050.
keywords: 将来完成时,will have,过去分词,by + 时间点,肯定式

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative form with 'will'.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 将来完成时否定形式：will not have + 过去分词
examples: I think that the best time for me to visit Scotland would be in July, because I will not have finished my university exams by June.、[talking about a cycling trip] Once we have finished, it we won't have done more than 40 km, and there are just another 10 to get to the Lakeside Inn.
keywords: 将来完成时,否定形式,will not have,过去分词,时间状语

content: Guideword: USE: EVENTS COMPLETED IN THE FUTURE. CanDo: Can use the future perfect simple with 'will' to talk about something which is expected to be completed (or not completed) by a certain point in the future.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: future perfect simple
chinese_human_name: 将来完成时：will have + 过去分词
examples: There is no problem if you want to leave at 4.30 pm as the match will have finished by that time.、First of all, if you go to work by bicycle every day, at the end of the month you will have saved more money because you won't have spent it buying petrol.
trigger_lemmas: by the time、by tomorrow、will have、won't have
keywords: 将来完成时,will have,过去分词,by + 时间点,未来事件完成

content: Guideword: USE: FUTURE ARRANGEMENTS. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a wide range of verbs to talk about future arrangements.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present continuous for future use
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时表将来安排：be + V-ing 表示已确定的未来计划
examples: We’re throwing a party for fun on 5th January.、She is joining the course on Friday.
trigger_lemmas: throwing a party、joining a course、meeting someone、traveling to
keywords: 现在进行时,将来安排,已确定计划,时间状语,be + V-ing

content: Guideword: USE: QUESTIONS ABOUT THE FUTURE. CanDo: Can use the present continuous with a wide range of common verbs to ask about future plans.
category: SuperCategory: FUTURE. SubCategory: present continuous for future use
chinese_human_name: 现在进行时表将来：询问未来计划
examples: So are you planning to visit Japan then?、When is the festival starting and when is it finishing?、What kind of seminar materials are you providing?
keywords: 现在进行时,未来计划,疑问句,时间状语,动词-ing

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE THING/ FACT/ POINT/ PROBLEM IS (THAT)'. CanDo: Can use 'The thing, fact, point, problem, or reason + is (that)' for focus.
chinese_human_name: 焦点强调句型：The thing/fact/point/problem/reason is (that)
examples: The reason is I like children, I have experience of looking after disabled people and I like to do things like volunteering.、The problem is I know myself, I am always late when I have to leave my house so I need a car to go faster.、The fact is that not all animals are able to deal with this.、The fact is science needs computers to increase knowledge and businesses need them like the air we breathe.、It is true that a lot of accidents are caused by cars. The point is that the car itself does not cause the accident.、The thing is, Alison is an eleven-year-old girl who has been, together with her father, left behind by her mother when she was just three.
trigger_lemmas: the thing is、the fact is、the point is、the problem is、the reason is
keywords: 焦点强调,抽象名词,从句引导,that省略,逻辑表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE REASON (THAT)', 'THE PLACE (WHICH)' + CLAUSE, SUBJECT. CanDo: Can use 'The reason (that)', 'The place (which)' + clause as subject + 'be' for focus. ► Relative clauses
chinese_human_name: 焦点结构：'The reason (that)'和'The place (which)'引导的从句作主语
examples: The reason I am writing is to suggest a few things about our holidays.、The reason that I never continued taking lessons is that my school-work became too heavy and the costs of lessons were too expensive for me as a student.、The place you need is called "Academiuta".、The place we appreciated the most was the Cap Frehel, where nature is still wild and the birds feel at home.、The place which has impressed me most of all in my life is Abastumani. (Georgia (Republic of); B2 VANTAGE; 1997; Russian; Pass).
keywords: 焦点结构,原因从句,地点从句,主语从句,关系从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: COMPARING. CanDo: Can use a range of phrases as discourse markers to introduce a comparison.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 书面语篇标记：用于比较的短语
examples: [talking about celebrating New Year] But some countries celebrate on other dates too, like they have Chinese New Year according to their calendar.  Likewise, in Nepal New Year is celebrated on 1st of Baishak, which is the start of a new year according to the Nepalese calendar.、This group is expected to decrease considerably in the next fifty years. Similarly, the population of children are likely to drop to 11.5% in 2050.、When you read a letter from someone, you can imagine and almost feel the emotions of that someone. In the same way, when you read a book, you can feel the author's sensations, travel to distant places or participate in adventures only possible in your imagination.
keywords: 语篇标记,比较,书面语,逻辑衔接,相似性

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: SUMMARISING, FORMAL. CanDo: Can use a range of phrases as discourse markers to summarise.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 书面语篇标记：总结性正式表达
examples: Thus, I would be very grateful if you would send me clear explanations of the following points: firstly, I would like you to specify what “the normal price” is, and therefore what would be the cost of two nights.、Consequently, visiting zoos can help people learn about nature.、Hence, there is a great need to improve the situation of those animals so that their life would not become life imprisonment.、Therefore, we are likely to enter the market as a pioneer, which will have a lot of benefits.
keywords: 语篇标记,总结性表达,正式写作,逻辑连接,书面语

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: ORGANISING, OPENINGS AND CLOSINGS, FORMAL. CanDo: Can use a range of phrases as discourse markers to open and close texts and point to conclusions, often in formal contexts.
category: SuperCategory: DISCOURSE MARKERS. SubCategory: discourse markers in writing
chinese_human_name: 书面语篇标记语：开头、结尾与结论引导词（正式语境）
examples: To begin with, I want to ensure that you are going to have a great time with us.、For a start, we have lived with books for thousands of years while television is only half a century old.、In conclusion, if people in zoos look after the animals, it isn’t cruel to keep an animal in zoo.、To sum up, I think that whether you use a car or a bicycle depends on several aspects: where you live, when you work, the weather, and also the kind of job you do.、In summary I would like to say that the majority of students is willing to help with cleaning, collecting the rubbish or even giving up their cars.
trigger_lemmas: to begin with、for a start、in conclusion、to sum up、in summary
keywords: 语篇标记语,正式写作,开头引导词,结尾总结词,逻辑结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'THE MORE … THE MORE …'. CanDo: Can use the in comparative phrases 'more', 'less', 'worse', 'better … the more', 'less', 'worse …' to talk about one thing that is affected by another. ► comparative clauses
chinese_human_name: 比较级结构：the more … the more …
examples: [talking about how watching TV is bad for you] I mean that you can watch one or two hours a day but the more you watch, the worse you become.、The better education you have, the better opportunities you can get.
keywords: 比较级,相关关系,the more the more,比较从句,正相关

content: Guideword: FORM: OF + NOUN PHRASE ''S'. CanDo: Can use ''s' after a noun phrase with of to indicate possession.
chinese_human_name: 所有格结构：of + 名词短语 + 's
examples: Actually, I know a great one and they can make a little discount for us because the owner is a friend of my father's .
trigger_lemmas: a friend of、a book of、a car of、a colleague of
keywords: 所有格,of结构,名词短语,部分所有,关联表达

content: Guideword: FORM: PLURAL NOUN + 'S''. CanDo: Can use 's'' after plural nouns to indicate possession.
chinese_human_name: 复数名词所有格：复数名词加's'表示所属关系
examples: I decided to spend the rest of my holiday in my parents' house, near the sea.、So, if you want to study animals' behaviour, try to do it without changing the real circumstances in which they act!
keywords: 复数名词,所有格,撇号,所属关系,规则复数

content: Guideword: USE: GENERIC 'THEIR'. CanDo: Can use 'their' before nouns to refer to a generic body or group of people expressed as a singular subject. ► generic pronouns
chinese_human_name: 物主代词their的泛指用法：用于单数主语的泛指人群
examples: … yet everyone has their preference for one or another.、Everyone has their own opinion.、IBM is a very important customer for us and they ordered 10,000 colour copies which show their new product.
keywords: their,泛指代词,单数主语,物主代词,性别中性

content: Guideword: FORM: 'ITS'. CanDo: Can use possessive determiner 'its' before nouns to refer to a singular inanimate subject or object.
chinese_human_name: 物主限定词：its的用法
examples: It was the biggest TV in the bazaar with its huge, black screen.、The journey was quite long but Verona is a great city, with its buildings and churches.、They've chosen my school because of its size.
trigger_lemmas: with its、because of its、lose its、have its
keywords: 物主限定词,its,单数无生命,所有关系,名词修饰

content: Guideword: FORM: 'LITTLE/FEW'. CanDo: Can use modifier + 'little' + uncountable nouns and modifier + 'few' + countable nouns, to indicate a lack of something or not as much as expected of something.► adverbs
chinese_human_name: 数量限定词：little/few的修饰用法
examples: I spend very little time outside, and I know I do not have enough stamina and strength.、We are sick of working hard for so little money.、There are so few animals living on the earth today and the pandas have so few places left to live and to eat, so we must try helping these animals.
trigger_lemmas: very little、so little、too little、very few、so few、too few
keywords: little,few,不可数名词,可数名词,修饰词,数量缺乏

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'BOTH … AND' WITH PHRASES AND CLAUSES. CanDo: Can use 'both … and' to combine phrases and clauses, often for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：both … and 用于连接短语和从句
examples: And we have won a high reputation both at home and abroad.、A lot of people think that television can both entertain and educate.、Why not buying some extra beer and sell them on the beach? So, I could both get some enjoyment and make some money. So that was I did.
trigger_lemmas: both … and、at home and abroad、entertain and educate
keywords: 并列连词,语法平行,强调结构,短语连接,从句连接

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NEITHER … NOR'. CanDo: Can use 'neither … nor' to connect two words, phrases or clauses, often to give emphasis or focus.
chinese_human_name: 并列连词：neither … nor 的用法
examples: Neither you nor I would like that.、We can neither eat nor drink during the lessons.、I have neither climbed nor surfed before, so that would be very exciting for me.
keywords: 并列连词,双重否定,就近原则,语法一致性,强调表达

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPLEX. CanDo: Can use more complex subordinating conjunctions ('as long as, as soon as, in order that, despite the fact that, due to the fact that, as if, as though') to introduce a subordinate clause.
chinese_human_name: 复杂从属连词：as long as, as soon as, in order that, despite the fact that, due to the fact that, as if, as though
examples: As far as I am concerned, keeping animals in zoos is not cruel as long as the zoos keep to certain rules concerning the conditions the animals have to be kept in.、I decided to go to Paris as soon as I finished university.、The jazz, rock and classical concerts were really entertaining except that there were some concert halls which were too small for the audience.、So take a rest in your hotel, in order that you can be prepared for your packed schedule.、To sum up, the festival was successful, so I hope most people enjoyed the festival despite the fact that there were some problems with the poor sound system, and so on.、Due to the fact that the mass of cars pollute the cities and the environment, we are forced to give up our city habits and learn to be more sensible by using public transportation.、From the window of my room I could see her every night, as if she was the great mother of the sky.、Everything was so familiar, so close, as though he had never left the place.
trigger_lemmas: as long as、as soon as、in order that、despite the fact that、due to the fact that、as if、as though
keywords: 从属连词,从句,逻辑关系,正式表达,虚拟语气

content: Guideword: FORM: SIMPLE. CanDo: Can use a wide range of simple subordinating conjunctions ('once, whereas, unless, except (that) provided (that)'), to introduce a subordinate clause.
chinese_human_name: 简单从属连词：once, whereas, unless, except (that), provided (that)
examples: Believe me, once you have tried it, you'll never give it up.、Once you become an employee, you'll get discounts on books and CDs.、Some of us find it very useful whereas others still have difficulty in accepting technology as a valuable thing for everyone.、Getting to work by car is comfortable, and faster unless you are caught in a traffic jam.、Unless the situation improves, we will be forced to try a new supplier.、Whenever I walk down the street, I always want to go into every shop.、I can't say that I’ve changed much, except that now I'm blond!、It offers special services for students provided you show your student card.、Also, provided that some customers are always in the shops, the electricity is not really "wasted".
keywords: 从属连词,从句,条件句,对比关系,例外表达

content: Guideword: FORM: 'THE SAME' (+ NOUN) + 'AS' + CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'the same' (+ noun) + 'as' + clause.
chinese_human_name: 比较结构：'the same' (+名词) + 'as' + 从句
examples: Maybe I'll do the same thing as you did.、She was the same as I remembered her, long-haired and green-eyed.、Some people say that friendship today is not the same as it used to be.
keywords: the same,as,从句,比较结构,相同性

content: Guideword: FORM: ADJECTIVE + 'ENOUGH' + 'TO'-INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'enough' after adjectives followed by 'to'-infinitive.
chinese_human_name: 形容词+enough+to不定式：表示“足够...去做...”的结构
examples: In my opinion young people at that age are not mature enough to decide by themselves what they want for their future.、I think I am responsible enough to handle this job.
keywords: enough,形容词,to不定式,程度表达,能力描述

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: SUPERLATIVE ADJECTIVE (+ 'THAT'). CanDo: Can use a superlative adjective (+ noun) (+ 'that') followed by a clause to talk about something unique.
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词+that从句：描述独特事物的表达方式
examples: It was probably the best comedy that anyone could ever have made; however, to the ones who were in the cinema, it didn't seem like a comedy but a horror film.、In my opinion this is the worst thing that can ever happen.、That is the clearest thing I can remember.、We have developed a new micro processor which is the fastest and smallest that exists at the moment.
trigger_lemmas: the best that、the worst that、the most that、the only that
keywords: 最高级形容词,that从句,定语从句,唯一性描述,极端特征

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPARATIVE ADJECTIVE + 'THAN' + NON-FINITE CLAUSE. CanDo: .||Can use than + an increasing range of non-finite clauses (to-infinitive, reduced clause)  forming the second part of a comparison after a comparative adjective||
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词+than+非谓语从句：高级比较结构
examples: It is much easier to be single than to have a partner.、Due to the provisions and considerations of the contract which was never revised, I think that arbitration is more appropriate than to file an action in court against the tenant.、It performs better than expected and attracts many new customers, especially during the week.
trigger_lemmas: easier than、better than、more appropriate than、than expected
keywords: 比较级形容词,than,非谓语从句,to-infinitive,省略从句

content: Guideword: FORM: 'RATHER THAN' + NON-FINITE CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'rather than' + a non-finite clause to stress one element in a comparison.
chinese_human_name: 比较结构：'rather than' + 非谓语从句
examples: If you prefer watching TV rather than reading, you have to be critical: you mustn't in any way accept everything, every image that passes in front of your eyes.、I would say that we are keen on walking in the mountains rather than going on a shopping trip to Edinburgh.、So, at night they are mostly tired and it's much easier to sit down in front of the television set rather than take a book and read it.、I would prefer to sleep in tents rather than stay in rooms.
keywords: rather than,非谓语从句,比较结构,动名词,不定式

content: Guideword: FORM: 'AS IF' OR 'AS THOUGH' + FINITE CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use 'as if' or 'as though' + finite clause to introduce a second clause as a comparison.
chinese_human_name: 比较从句：'as if' 或 'as though' + 限定从句
examples: Her heart beat extremely fast, as if it was going to burst out of her chest.、I saw my mate crawling on the floor as if he was looking for something.、Everything was so familiar, so close, as though he had never left the place.
keywords: 比较从句,as if,as though,限定从句,虚拟语气

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NEITHER … NOR', EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can combine two main clauses of the same type using 'neither' in front or mid position, followed by 'nor' to introduce the second clause, for emphasis.
chinese_human_name: 并列否定结构：neither ... nor 的强调用法
examples: We neither walk nor do exercises.、They neither got married nor had children.、We should neither eat too much, nor eat too.
keywords: neither,nor,并列否定,强调语气,倒装结构

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'NOT ONLY … BUT (ALSO)', FOCUS. CanDo: Can combine clauses using 'not only' in mid position of the first clause followed by … 'but (also)' to introduce the second clause, to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 并列从句结构：not only … but (also) 强调用法
examples: The atmosphere was friendly, not only because it wasn't too crowded, but also because the waiters always help you.、I really like it; not only because it is nice and colourful  but because I spent most of my childhood summers there.
keywords: 并列从句,强调结构,not only,but also,原因从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'LET'S NOT', SUGGESTION. CanDo: Can use 'let's not' + base form of a main verb to make a suggestion.
chinese_human_name: 建议性否定祈使句：Let's not + 动词原形
examples: Let's not lose track of each other again!、Let's not forget that zoos actually help us keep dying species alive ….、Let's not make the situation more complicated with companies and things like that.
keywords: 祈使句,否定建议,动词原形,委婉语气,集体行动

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: 'DO NOT', EMPHASIS. CanDo: Can use 'do not' for emphasis or in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 强调性否定祈使句：'Do not' 的正式与强调用法
examples: Do not forget to have a break at lunchtime and try to eat your meal whenever possible in a silent room.、Do not hesitate to contact me should you need further information.
trigger_lemmas: do not forget、do not hesitate、do not enter、do not disturb
keywords: 祈使句,否定形式,强调语气,正式语境,Do not结构

content: Guideword: FORM: NEGATIVE INTERROGATIVE + ADVERB. CanDo: Can form negative interrogative clauses with an adverb in mid position, between the subject and the main verb.
chinese_human_name: 否定疑问句+副词中位结构：如“Why don't you ever listen?”
examples: Money - hasn't it always been one of the most important problems for students?、Why don't you ever listen to me?、Haven't you ever heard about the photographer Donatela and the painter Christian?
trigger_lemmas: why don't you、haven't you、isn't it、don't you ever
keywords: 否定疑问句,副词中位,反问语气,词序规则,助动词否定形式

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NEGATIVE INTERROGATIVE. CanDo: Can use the negative interrogative form of an auxiliary verb to express surprise or enthusiasm.
chinese_human_name: 否定疑问句表达惊喜或热情：Wouldn't it be wonderful!
examples: Wouldn't it be wonderful!、Doesn't that sound excellent to you?!
keywords: 否定疑问句,助动词,表达惊喜,语调降调,Wouldn't it be

content: Guideword: FORM: PRONOUN + PREPOSITION. CanDo: Can use defining relative clauses and non-defining relative clauses ending in a preposition, with 'who/which/that' as the complement of the preposition.
chinese_human_name: 关系从句：介词结尾的限定性与非限定性从句
examples: Thank you very much for having provided us with valuable information about your finance services, which we are greatly interested in.、I would like to do some painting, which I am quite good at.、They have three wonderful children who I love to play with.、He was involved in a case that he had nothing to do with!
keywords: 关系从句,介词结尾,限定性从句,非限定性从句,关系代词

content: Guideword: FORM: NON-DEFINING, WITH 'WHOSE'. CanDo: Can use non-defining relative clauses with 'whose', to give additional information.
chinese_human_name: 非限定性定语从句：使用'whose'补充信息
examples: And I was initially employed to be an entrance assistant, whose job was to keep the queue under control as well as keeping the area clean.、I was at the concert when I met a friend of mine whose job is to organise shows like that.
keywords: 非限定性定语从句,whose,所属关系,附加信息,逗号分隔

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: DEFINING, WITH 'WHOSE'. CanDo: Can use defining relative clauses with 'whose', to give more information about relationship.
chinese_human_name: 限定性关系从句：使用'whose'表示所属关系
examples: I visited several primary schools in Canberra and had opportunities to teach not only Australian children but also Vietnamese children whose parents immigrated to Australia.、Mary is a young lady whose parents had died and she had nobody else but an aunt to live with.
keywords: 限定性关系从句,关系代词whose,所属关系,先行词,定语从句

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: SENTENCE, EVALUATIVE. CanDo: Can use a relative clause to refer to a whole clause or sentence, often to express an opinion or evaluation or give a reason.
chinese_human_name: 关系从句：用于评价或说明整个句子
examples: It is now possible to send a letter and receive an answer within ten minutes, which is a good thing if you want to buy a house, a car etc.、In addition, zoological gardens allow us to get to know the lifestyles of some animals better, which is very important from the point of view of their protection.、I have also visited the dance shows and the art exhibitions, as well as the talks by writers, which were all really brilliant.
keywords: 关系从句,which,非限制性,评价,整个句子

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: NON-FINITE WITH '-ING'. CanDo: Can use a non-finite subordinate clause with 'after' + 'having/being' + '-ed' form, before a main clause, to refer to past time.
chinese_human_name: 非谓语从句：'after having/being + -ed' 表示过去时间
examples: After having worked for many hours, you'll probably be tired.、After having left you, we reached Dublin and we stayed there for four days and then we made a tour of Ireland.、After being given the pass you'll be able to take as many pictures you like.
keywords: 非谓语从句,after having,after being,过去时间,时间顺序

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: CONDITIONS. CanDo: Can use a finite subordinate clause, before or after a main clause, with conjunctions to introduce conditions. ► clauses: conditionals
chinese_human_name: 条件状语从句：使用unless、provided等连词引导
examples: Unless something is done many people will die.、Getting to work by car is comfortable and faster unless you are caught in a traffic jam.、Provided the weather is fine, you could also go swimming or take a tour through our beautiful town.、I agree with you that your house will certainly be too small and I like your suggestion to book the Majestic Hotel, provided it will not be too expensive.
keywords: 条件状语从句,unless,provided,连词,时态一致

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: '-ING' CLAUSE. CanDo: Can use a non-finite clause, introduced by '-ing' before a main clause, to give more information.
chinese_human_name: 非限定性-ing从句：主句前表补充信息
examples: Having no choice, I sat down on a bench which was in the middle of the road to wait for the rain to stop.、Using his best smile, Paul asked her if he could sit beside her.、Having analysed the data I have concluded that CTP Translations would suit our company best.
keywords: -ing从句,非限定性从句,补充信息,主句前,逗号隔开

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: SUBORDINATING CONJUNCTIONS, CONDITIONS. CanDo: Can use conditional subordinate clauses with a range of conjunctions ('as long as', 'provided') + present simple or present continuous, with future reference.
chinese_human_name: 条件状语从句：使用as long as/provided等连词+现在时表将来条件
examples: As long as it involves children I'd be delighted to work for you during the summer.、If you're really eager to learn age doesn’t really matter as long as you're willing to learn.、My client will most certainly ask for compensation covering all losses incurred, unless you manage to find out where the goods are.、Finally, I am pleased to inform you that we would like to offer a 10% discount provided you reserve office space for eighteen months.、Providing we implement the suggested actions I believe we can increase sales within the next six months, overcoming the current situation caused by the international situation.、I would suggest that you might bring a city map in case you lose your way.
keywords: 条件状语从句,从属连词,现在简单时,将来参考,as long as,provided,unless

content: Guideword: USE: MANNER. CanDo: Can use a wide range of manner adverbs to modify how something happpens.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 方式副词：修饰动作发生的方式
examples: She realises that he is a very dangerous man and that she should take his warning seriously.、Today I read the notice "Volunteers needed urgently " and I would like to be one.、As our parking space has been used illegally by the public, we will change our parking system.
keywords: 方式副词,修饰动词,词序,-ly后缀,固定搭配

content: Guideword: USE: TIME. CanDo: Can use a wide range of adverbs and adverb phrases to refer to the timing of an event.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs and adverb phrases: types and meanings
chinese_human_name: 时间副词与副词短语：事件时间表达
examples: I look forward hearing from you shortly and I thank you in advance.、It sounded like a muffled laugh, and she instantly recognised it as her mother's.、It isn't the job you will do permanently .、You know it's very difficult to decide what to buy if you need both things simultaneously.、The trend that has appeared rather recently and is very common among young people nowadays is named "casual chique".
keywords: 时间副词,副词短语,即时性,同时性,频率副词

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, MODIFYING DETERMINERS. CanDo: Can use degree adverbs ('almost', 'very') to modify determiners. ► determiners
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰限定词：almost、very等
examples: Today, thanks to the Internet, I can work at home almost all the time, which is far more relaxing and less boring.、There are probably very few of us who have never been to a zoo.
keywords: 程度副词,限定词,almost,very,修饰结构

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, MODIFYING PRONOUNS. CanDo: Can use degree adverbs to modify pronouns. ► pronouns
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
examples: You can eat very well and pay almost nothing.、This is the most crowded place in my town and you can buy absolutely anything you like.

content: Guideword: FORM: DEGREE, MODIFYING NOUN PHRASES. CanDo: Can use degree adverbs to modify noun phrases. ► noun phrases
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverbs as modifiers
chinese_human_name: 程度副词修饰名词短语：quite a, rather a, almost a
examples: It would be quite a formal meeting.、I live rather a long way from work, about 10 km.、[talking about a dog] After all, he is almost a human.
keywords: 程度副词,名词短语,不定冠词,quite a,rather a,almost a,修饰语序

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: FRONT POSITION, INVERSION WITH 'NEVER'. CanDo: Can use 'never' in front position followed by an inverted subject (most commonly 'I') + main verb verb, to give focus.
chinese_human_name: 副词位置：never前置倒装句
examples: Never have I seen such a realistic and impressive film before.、Never had I thought that my parents would do this to me.
keywords: never,倒装,强调句型,否定副词,前置位置

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPARATIVE. CanDo: Can modify an adverb with a comparative structure.
category: SuperCategory: ADVERBS. SubCategory: adverb phrases - form
chinese_human_name: 副词短语的比较级结构：如何用比较级修饰副词
examples: Obviously, you can get to work by car quicker and more comfortably than by bicycle.、Furthermore, you have to repair your car much more often than your bicycle - so it's quite probable that you are going to spend plenty of time in the garage.、The computer system is such a quick system that we can search and analyse information much more quickly than before.、If we could get 2 million euros to invest in the new product "Stop 'n' run", profits will rise even more sharply than they did last year.
keywords: 副词比较级,more quickly,than,much more,不规则变化

content: Guideword: FORM: COMPOUND ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use an increasing range of compound adjectives ('up-to-date', 'state-of-the-art')
chinese_human_name: 复合形容词：up-to-date、state-of-the-art等组合用法
examples: The selling point is that it contains the most up-to-date and state-of-the-art know-how, for instance a water-proof keyboard, information security system, etc. A survey of our customers last year indicated that over 70% of them are content with the user-friendly designs.、…getting to work (in big cities) by car is more healthy for drivers but has a long-term effect on the environment and on us, in the end, as well.
keywords: 复合形容词,连字符,前置定语,技术描述,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM: PHRASES MODIFYING NOUNS. CanDo: Can use adjective phrases to modify nouns.
chinese_human_name: 形容词短语修饰名词：用短语丰富名词描述
examples: Besides, we could leave one day in the morning and travel by boat to a small and exotic island full of different and exotic species of birds that we could observe and photograph.、Emily Brontë succeeded in writing a romantic, psychological and tragic story, beautifully set in these mysterious moors.
keywords: 形容词短语,后置定语,修饰名词,介词短语,固定搭配

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'SLIGHTLY'. CanDo: Can use 'slightly' to modify comparative adjectives to a small degree.
chinese_human_name: 比较级修饰词：用'slightly'表示轻微程度
examples: I bought a new one, since the price of a second-hand one was slightly cheaper.、They have their own characteristics, but the food of restaurant A is slightly better than that of B.
keywords: slightly,比较级形容词,轻微程度,修饰词,差异表达

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'A LOT'. CanDo: Can use 'a lot' to modify and intensify comparative adjectives used predicatively after a verb, usually 'be'.
chinese_human_name: 比较级形容词的强化修饰：使用'a lot'
examples: In addition, remember that a bike, even a good one, is a lot cheaper than a car.、Don't you think it would be a lot easier for you to finish college first?
keywords: a lot,比较级形容词,表语,be动词,程度强化

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'MUCH' + NOUN. CanDo: Can use 'much' to modify and intensify comparative adjectives used attributively before countable and uncountable nouns.
chinese_human_name: 形容词比较级强化修饰：用'much'修饰名词前的比较级形容词
examples: Although it is a second-hand computer which one of my colleagues sold me, it is a much better investment than the bicycle, I think.、I think the Majestic Hotel is too expensive, so what about a much cheaper hotel like the Plaza Hotel?、On the other hand, our grandparents had much fresher vegetables and meat they could trust, without BSE...
keywords: much,比较级形容词,强化修饰,可数名词,不可数名词

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'ENOUGH' + 'TO'-INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use 'enough' after adjectives followed by 'to'-infinitive
chinese_human_name: 形容词后接enough加to不定式：表达足够程度做某事
examples: [talking about an arts festival] I was lucky enough to take part in it last November, and I enjoyed it immensely.、In my opinion young people at that age are not mature enough to decide by themselves what they want for their future.
trigger_lemmas: lucky enough to、mature enough to、old enough to、strong enough to
keywords: enough,to不定式,形容词,程度表达,能力描述

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH 'RATHER A'. CanDo: Can form adjective phrases with 'rather a' + adjective, often in formal contexts.
chinese_human_name: 形容词短语：rather a + 形容词
examples: Films tend to be rather a simple art, while books are a thing to be enjoyed in a calmer way.、I must confess that I'm rather a poor player.、I live rather a long way from work, about 10 km.
trigger_lemmas: rather a、rather a simple、rather a poor、rather a long
keywords: rather a,形容词短语,正式语境,修饰名词,词序

content: Guideword: FORM: ATTRIBUTIVE ONLY, TIME ADJECTIVES. CanDo: Can use the adjectives 'present', 'future', 'former' before a noun.
chinese_human_name: 限定性时间形容词：present、future、former的定语用法
examples: I think we all are very concerned about the present situation.、We would like to hear you talk about your novels, your work in general and about your future plans.、In the big hall, in former times, lots of parties took place.
keywords: 限定性形容词,定语位置,时间形容词,present,future,former,名词修饰

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: DEGREE ADJECTIVES BEFORE NOUNS. CanDo: Can use a limited range of degree adjectives ('real', 'absolute', 'complete') before a noun to express intensity.
chinese_human_name: 程度形容词前置：real、absolute、complete在名词前的强调用法
examples: When tourists arrive, there is no area to park. This is a real problem and our town is becoming very dangerous for children; every week there is an accident.、Making friends is easy but to get a real, true friend is hard.、Suddenly the lights went out and I found myself standing in  complete darkness.、After the teacher had told us to start, there was absolute silence.
keywords: 程度形容词,real,absolute,complete,名词前置,强调用法

content: Guideword: FORM/USE: WITH 'BY FAR'. CanDo: Can use the premodifer 'by far' to make a superlative adjective stronger.
chinese_human_name: 形容词最高级强化表达：使用'by far'
examples: As you know, I've already visited almost fifty forests all over the world but I think this one is by far the most beautiful of all.、When I was a child, Christmas morning was by far the most exciting and happiest moment.
keywords: by far,最高级,强化修饰,前置修饰语,the most

content: Guideword: FORM: ELLIPSIS, WITH 'THE'. CanDo: Can use '(one of) the' with an increasing range of superlative adjectives without a following noun, when the noun is understood.
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词省略名词：使用'(one of) the'结构
examples: There have been so many embarrassing moments in my life. It's very difficult to pick the most embarrassing.、I'm not quite sure if I agree that the car is the greatest danger to human life today, but it sure is one of the greatest.、That period of my life was one of the worst .
trigger_lemmas: the most、one of the、the best、the worst
keywords: 最高级形容词,名词省略,定冠词the,one of the,语境理解

content: Guideword: FORM: WITH NOUN AND 'TO-' INFINITIVE. CanDo: Can use superlative adjectives before a noun + 'to'-infinitive. ► clauses: comparative
chinese_human_name: 最高级形容词 + 名词 + 'to-'不定式：表达最佳方式的句型
examples: To be honest, I think that, to be in competition with other markets, we need to be updated and the easiest way to do it is to use computers.、For those people who don't work and can't afford a car, a bicycle is perhaps the cheapest way to travel in the city.
trigger_lemmas: the easiest way to、the cheapest way to、the best way to
keywords: 最高级形容词,to-不定式,名词,最佳方式,比较句型
